programme.desc: When the Tortuga crashes somewhere in the middle of the Amazon rainforest, the ship's electrical system is destroyed. Grounded and exposed to the elements and predators - like jaguars and crocodiles - the Wild Kratts must come up with a plan quickly.

programme.title: Peg + Cat: The Dinosaur Problem/ The Beethoven Problem
programme.desc: When Peg and Cat get lost riding dinosaurs through a prehistoric forest, they use a diagram to find their way before a baby T-Rex catches up to them.

programme.title: Cyberchase: Sensible Flats
programme.desc: Our Cyber-Team is transported to a Wild West site to prove that Hacker has taken a larger piece of land than he is allowed. Hacker is in jail and the trial is about to begin, but is his homestead larger than what Judge Trudy will allow?

programme.title: SciGirls: Multitasking Mania
programme.desc: Alejandra and her friends attempt to discover if teens can multitask as well as they think they can.

programme.title: Nova: Ice Worlds
programme.desc: New Horizons conducted the first flyby of Pluto in 2015. Its dazzling images revealed Pluto’s jagged ice mountains and an underground ocean that changed everything scientists thought about the beloved dwarf planet.

programme.title: History Detectives: Tokyo Rose Recording/ Crazy Horse Photo/ WWII Diary
programme.desc: A contributor owns a recording he believes was used during the trial of Japanese propagandist Iva Tugori. A man believes he was given a leather purse with a photograph of Crazy Horse inside. A man in Lexington has a diary written by a WWII pilot.

programme.title: Africa's Great Civilizations: The Cross and the Crescent
programme.desc: Gates charts the ancient rise of Christianity & Islam, whose economic & cultural influence stretched from Egypt to Ethiopia. Learn of African religious figures like King Lalibela, an Ethiopian saint, and Menelik, bringer of the Ark of the Covenant.

programme.title: Breakthrough: The Ideas That Changed the World: The Rocket
programme.desc: Learn the explosive history of the rocket, from its origin in ancient China, to its use as a weapon of war, to how adding hydrogen allowed it to carry astronauts all the way to the moon.

programme.title: Nova: Ice Worlds
programme.desc: New Horizons conducted the first flyby of Pluto in 2015. Its dazzling images revealed Pluto’s jagged ice mountains and an underground ocean that changed everything scientists thought about the beloved dwarf planet.

programme.title: American Masters: Maya Angelou
programme.desc: Journey through the prolific life of 'I Know Why the Caged Bird Sings' author Maya Angelou. The activist inspired generations with lyrical modern African-American thought. New interviews with Oprah Winfrey, Common, the Clintons and others are featured.

programme.title: The Greeks: Cavemen to Kings
programme.desc: Uncover the first draft of Western civilization, which, though it met a spectacular end, laid the groundwork for the revolution in human thought that was to come.

programme.title: The Greeks: The Good Strife
programme.desc: Watch as ancient Greeks strive for excellence, strife proves to be an inescapable certainty-and it's not long before the rising civilization and all that it promises will face its gravest tests.

programme.desc: When the body of a young boy is found, the detectives learn that he had been abused.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Chasing Demons

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: In Loco Parentis

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Dare
programme.desc: A girl's tragic death becomes a criminal case when a surgeon harvests her organs without parental consent.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Send in the Clowns
programme.desc: A student disappears on a school trip to New York City, leading cops to race to find a masked man. Fin and Stone get visits from family.

programme.title: The Sinner: Part VIII
programme.desc: Jamie seeks vengeance, putting him on a collision course with Ambrose.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Outrage

programme.desc: Antonio struggles with his guilty conscience as he tries to take down a major drug dealer. In order to protect his team, Voight takes a big shot at Kelton.

programme.desc: Jamie seeks vengeance, putting him on a collision course with Ambrose.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Case of the Libertine Belle

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Beauty and the Beast
programme.desc: Blanche is visited by her granddaughter, Melissa, and the only thing that Blanche has on her mind is Melissa winning a Little Miss Beauty Contest. Meanwhile, Dorothy hires a nurse to look after a recuperating Sophia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That's for Me to Know

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Where's Charlie?

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Motherload

programme.title: Frasier: And the Whimper Is...
programme.desc: Frasier and Roz attempt to improve their chance of winning a SeaBea by sending gifts to the jury members. Frasier soon regrets his actions when he learns that an eminent talk show host is retiring at the end of the year.

programme.title: Frasier: Give Him the Chair
programme.desc: After replacing Martin's favourite chair with a new one, Frasier is forced to appeal for the old chair's whereabouts on his show and finally locates it as a stage prop for a school play.

programme.title: Frasier: Fortysomething
programme.desc: Middle age begins to take its toll on Frasier, and he wonders if a relationship with an attractive younger sales assistant may be the answer.

programme.title: Frasier: Travels With Martin

programme.title: Frasier: Author, Author
programme.desc: Petty jealousy reigns when Niles and Frasier lock themselves in a hotel room to write a book about sibling relationships.

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier Crane's Day Off
programme.desc: When Frasier comes down with the flu, he is reluctant to let Gil fill in for him for fear of losing his timeslot. Despite sending Niles to fill in for him, a delirious Frasier decides to rush down to the station to reclaim his show.

programme.title: Frasier: My Coffee With Niles
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles meet at Café Nervosa to discuss the one-year anniversary of Frasier's move to Seattle.

programme.title: Frasier: Slow Tango in South Seattle
programme.desc: An old friend writes a book about how Frasier lost his virginity with his piano teacher.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Hires An English Tutor
programme.desc: Lucy hires a tutor so her baby will be raised in the 'proper vocal environment.'

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Becomes a Sculptress
programme.desc: No child should grow up without an artistic influence, so Lucy takes up sculpting.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Goes to the Hospital

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dateline, Miami

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: A hurricane is brewing, and not just outside, when Stan visits to tell Dorothy he's over her and moving on. Dorothy quickly discovers he's moving on with her sister, Gloria.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: Dorothy's discovery of Gloria sleeping with Stan just adds to their sibling rivalry. Meanwhile, Sophia has had it and leaves just prior the hurricane hitting.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose Loves Miles
programme.desc: Rose has had it with Miles' penny pinching ways and decides to take Blanche's advice and go out with her and some big spenders. Meanwhile, Blanche has been left in charge of Sophia while Dorothy is away.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Room Seven
programme.desc: Sophia has an after-life experience, seeing her late husband in heaven, while choking on a piece of candy. Meanwhile, Blanche is distraught over the demolition of her grandmother's plantation, so the girls travel to Atlanta.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: From Here to the Pharmacy
programme.desc: A man Blanche has no memory of returns from the Persian Gulf in hopes of fulfilling the promise she supposedly made to him before he left, that she will be his and only his.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: The hosts welcome Andrea Brooks and Paul Greene from 'When Calls the Heart' and reality TV star and cancer survivor Ethan Zohn.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Evergreen: Letters to Santa
programme.desc: A woman returns to her home town for Christmas and discovers that the town's historic general store has shut down. Using the skills she has as a retail designer, she is determined to bring the store back to life in time for the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: The Mistletoe Promise
programme.desc: Two strangers who share a disdain for Christmas navigate their holiday complications together by creating The Mistletoe Promise. As they spend more time with each other, they discover there may be more to their contract.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at Holly Lodge
programme.desc: A woman inherits the Evergreen Inn and Ski Lodge from her parents and starts a new tradition of spending every holiday there. While visiting she meets a family that will change her life.

programme.title: The Office: Casino Night
programme.desc: Michael and the Dunder Mifflin crew hold a Casino Night for charity in their warehouse and take some big gambles.

programme.title: The Office: Gay Witch Hunt
programme.desc: When Michael unintentionally outs a gay employee, he stumbles through a sensitivity mine-field.

programme.title: The Office: The Convention
programme.desc: After meeting Jan in Philadelphia for the annual Northeastern Mid-Market Office Supply Convention, Michael enlists Dwight's help in organizing a party in his room for fellow conventioneers. Meanwhile, Ryan and Kelly join friends out on a double date.

programme.title: The Office: The Coup
programme.desc: After Jan busts Michael for telling the employees they can watch movies instead of working on Mondays, Angela pushes Dwight to make a play for Michael's job. In the meantime, Pam surfs the internet and Jim plays video games.

programme.title: The Office: Grief Counseling
programme.desc: After learning that his old boss, the former regional manager, has died, Michael attempts to guide the Dunder Mifflin staff through their grief as he searches for the right way to honour the company man.

programme.title: The Office: Initiation
programme.desc: New full-time employee Ryan anxiously accompanies Dwight on his first sales call, but is taken aback by the odd series of challenges Dunder Miffin's top salesman puts him through along the way, including a sidetrip to the Schrute family beet farm.

programme.title: The Office: Diwali
programme.desc: Michael encourages the entire Scranton branch to support Kelly and attend a local celebration of Diwali, the Hindu Festival of Lights. As Ryan nervously faces Kelly's family at the event, Michael, his new girlfriend and the staff sample Indian cuisine.

programme.title: The Office: The Merger
programme.desc: The Scranton branch and the Stamford branch of Dunder-Mifflin are merged, bringing old friends Jim and Pam back together after months apart. Michael and Dwight and the other employees deal with the changes.

programme.title: The Office: The Convict
programme.desc: Michael tries to be supportive after he learns that a new employee is an ex-convict.

programme.title: The Office: Back From Vacation
programme.desc: Still in vacation mode after his trip to Jamaica, Michael tries to hang on to his relaxed island vibe despite a wave of office hassles. It all becomes too much when an e-mail containing a racy vacation photo is forwarded around the office.

programme.title: The Office: Traveling Salesmen
programme.desc: On Andy's suggestion, Michael has staffers team up for sales calls, leading to some interesting, insightful moments in the field. Meanwhile, Dwight attempts to cover for Angela after she misses an important deadline.

programme.title: The Office: The Return
programme.desc: Oscar returns from his vacation with mixed emotions on whether or not he wants to be a part of the office. Meanwhile, Andy takes advantage of recent events to get closer to Michael. Jim turns to Karen and Pam for help to stage a prank on a new target.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: March 26, 2020
programme.desc: News reports, trends, pop culture, sports and politics with an alternative point of view.

programme.title: The Office: Phyllis' Wedding
programme.desc: Phyllis regrets giving Michael an important job at her wedding after several embarrassing moments. Pam has flashbacks of her own wedding planning when she sees Phyllis's decorations. Meanwhile, Dwight is determined to catch wedding crashers.

programme.title: South Park: Bebe's Boobs Destroy Society
programme.desc: Bebe is the first girl in the fourth grade to 'develop.' Her new little breasts inspire a primate-like reaction from all the boys in class that threatens their friendship and society in general.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bagging a Killer
programme.desc: Police use satellites to trace the kidnapper of a nine-year-old girl. After questioning whether the girl's long lost mother was somehow involved, the satellite tracking reveals who the kidnapper is, where they took her, and why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Trouble
programme.desc: A Maine State Trooper is attacked during a routine stop which triggers a chain of events that jump starts a stalled murder case hundreds of miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus
programme.desc: In Cleveland, more than thirty cases of people suffering from bleeding lungs were reported in the span of a few months. Doctors had never seen anything like it, and searched frantically for the cause and a cure.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sealed With a Kiss
programme.desc: For more than a year, angry, hateful letters were sent to a first grade school teacher in a small town in Pennsylvania. When scientists analyzed the letters, they found evidence that the sender knew a lot about the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Postal Mortem
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bombs rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day, but this time the victim survived. Police believed that the survivor is more than an innocent by-stander.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Outbreak
programme.desc: Patients surface with similar symptoms and doctors have to act fast if they hope to save lives.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Disease Detectives
programme.desc: The CDC Disease Detectives investigate several emergency room patients with strange infections.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: Police investigate when a severed leg is found in the garbage. When they realize they can't use conventional techniques to catch the killer, police must use scientific techniques like DNA testing and toxicology reports to find him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Partners in Crime

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Killing Room

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ultimate Betrayal

programme.desc: Dave Turin and his crew turn their trommel up to double speed hoping to get the most gold from Montana's historic Birdseye mine. Dirty water and ground that's not producing challenge the crew, forcing Dave to call an audible at the last minute.

programme.title: Gold Rush: No Guts No Glory
programme.desc: Six recession-hit patriots from Oregon become greenhorn old miners and head to Alaska to dig for gold in hopes of striking it big to save themselves from financial ruin.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Gold, Guns, and Bears
programme.desc: The greenhorn miners are at risk when a mechanical accident threatens to close mining season.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Running Dirt
programme.desc: The crew races to set up the mining plant and start running dirt. When the families arrive from Oregon and question the lack of gold and the men's only mechanic becomes dangerously ill, the tension builds so high Dorsey and Todd come to blows.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Ultimate Price
programme.desc: The team attempts to finally run potential pay dirt through the wash plant, but a visit from the Department of Fish and Game reveals a violation, jeopardizing their vital water supply to the mine.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Pain Barrier
programme.desc: The miners continue to run dirt but an equipment malfunction brings the operation to a halt. James Harness collapses and Jimmy Dorsey drives a wedge between himself and the crew when he takes on an extra job to earn cash.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Gold Fever
programme.desc: After 80 days, the miners are behind schedule and out of money. They need to find $10,000 worth of gold within two days or the families will be sent home. Meanwhile, after Dorsey struggles with the wave table, tensions flare and fists fly.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Going for Broke
programme.desc: With winter weather closing in, a gold recovery expert comes to help the rookies. Todd discovers a major design flaw in the equipment and is forced to make huge modifications.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Bad Blood
programme.desc: The crew remains in deep financial hole. Veteran miner "Dakota" Fred thinks he can turn things around and he cranks up production faster than ever before. But when things start falling apart, tensions mount and Harness can't keep his frustration in.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Bedrock or Bust
programme.desc: Desperate to get to bedrock and large quantities of gold, Todd and Jack throw caution to the wind and dig deeper than ever before. With the brutal Alaskan winter threatening, they battle floods, cave-ins and equipment breakdowns.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Never Say Die
programme.desc: With the arctic winter looming, the crew races against the clock. Rain and thawing snow flood the mine and Jack puts his life on the line as the glory hole caves in around the massive 100,000 pound excavator.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Romancing the Lump

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Warning: Cystem Shutdown!

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Buffalo Bull
programme.desc: President Ronald Reagan's high school yearbook comes into the shop, complete with a signed letter from 'The Gipper'.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Guns and Rangers
programme.desc: The Pawn stars have a chance to buy a key from the 16th or 17th century, but it does not open doors, it shoots bullets.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Poker Night
programme.desc: It's a high stakes proposition when a man saddles up to the shop with a 19th century professional gambling set.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pony Up
programme.desc: A collection from former Attorney General J. Howard McGrath enters the shop complete with his Secret Service I.D. and some counterfeit money. Rick and Chumlee encounter a 1960s U. S. Marines vehicle called a "Mighty Mite."

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Say It Ain't So
programme.desc: The guys check out a Savage Navy pistol, and Corey and Chum orbit a Moonman statue from the MTV Video Music Awards.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: That Sinking Feeling
programme.desc: A book signed by Charles Lindbergh flies into focus for the Pawn Stars, while a medal issued by Germany torpedoes into the shop. A guy tries to throw Rick off balance with a rare 17th-century money scale.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: World Series of Pawn
programme.desc: The guys look at a Los Angeles Dodgers World Series pennant signed by Frank Sinatra.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Ready to Rumble
programme.desc: The guys check out a pair of punching bags owned by Rocky Marciano.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Tee'd Off
programme.desc: A USGA 'rules of golf book' from 1934 putts into the shop. Then, Rick checks out an organ owned by Steven Tyler. Later, Chumlee takes a big swing at golf after he and Corey make a wager.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Silent Stars and Rebel Cars
programme.desc: Corey checks out a 1940 Buick said to have been owned by Fidel Castro. Will he jump at the chance to own a piece of the communist's sedan? Then, Rick is silenced when Charlie Chaplin's driver's licence cruises into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: No Pawn for You!
programme.desc: A chair belonging to Abraham Lincoln; a vintage Nintendo Donkey Kong arcade game; a signed Seinfeld script; a brigade of antique firefighting buckets.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Seven Barreled Pawn
programme.desc: A Nock Valley gun used by the Royal Navy; an etching by Joan Miro; the first American pasta machine.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Money to Pawn
programme.desc: Don't get fooled at the pawn shop when a seller hands Chumlee a thirty dollar bill. Will this curious cash have Chum reaching for his wallet to buy it or will it turn out to be a costly currency that's not worth making a deal?

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn Patent
programme.desc: An autograph of astronomer Edwin Hubble; an 1850s patent model self-lighting and extinguishing lantern; a Starrett Food Chopper; an 1871 British Martini-Henry Short Lever Rifle.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Fully Vested
programme.desc: A pretty pair of 18th century breechloading pistols mosey into the shop. A seller pops by with a paperweight by renowned glass artist, Paul Stankard. A custom, harmonica-holding vest that was made for Blues Traveler's front man, John Popper, stuns Chum.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Payne in the Putt
programme.desc: By a stroke of luck, a pair of knickers that belonged to golfer Payne Stewart swing into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: A Game of Pawns
programme.desc: Winter is coming when Rick sees an autographed Game of Thrones item. Then, Chumlee stirs up commotion with an Amazonian blowgun, and picker Spencer Victory stops by with an ancient Middle Eastern sword. Later, Rick checks out a 1900s DNC collectible.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: From Pawn, With Love
programme.desc: Rick Dale helps Corey and Chumlee out with restoring an antique games from the 1990s. Then, Rick checks out a never before seen map from the Battle of Gettysburg. Plus, vintage stuffed animals get Corey and Chum emotional.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Grave Robbery
programme.desc: Detectives respond to a cemetery caretaker's complaint of several grave robberies.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Mardi Gras
programme.desc: Deputies work around the clock in Terrebonne Parish, which is home to the second biggest Mardi Gras in the state.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Catfish and Gators
programme.desc: When a vicious alligator attacks a dog, Deputy Melissa 'Catfish' Quintal calls in her alligator hunter boyfriend, Jacob Lirette, known as the 'Gator Man', to handle it. Also, deputies are sent in the dead of night to the eeriest bayous they've ever seen.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Poached
programme.desc: Detectives come up with a creative plan to catch two dangerous alligator poachers red-handed.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Stuck
programme.desc: Two inmates suffer life-threatening stab wounds during a melee on the exercise yard that involves two rival gangs.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Shanked
programme.desc: An inmate with a shank sticking out of his stomach is rushed to the infirmary. Before losing consciousness, he gives the agents a lead on the case.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Special Delivery
programme.desc: A case that involves cocaine, morphine and a strange love triangle leads the Squad into the community for a street bust.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Robert/ Vachagan
programme.desc: A man with everything going for him falls prey to drugs, leading him to crime.

programme.title: American Monster: The Last Broadcast
programme.desc: After a taping of their local-access TV show in rural Vermont, Chrissy and Charlie Billis have a terrible accident, smashing their car into a tree. Only one survives. But tapes from the couple's TV show suggest a sinister tale behind what really happened.

programme.title: American Monster: Stages of Grief
programme.desc: In suburban California, an intruder brutally attacks and kills Joan Dawley. As the Dawley family grieves, it's up to LAPD detectives to crack the case. Secret home movies uncover a shocking tale of deceit, and a monster lurking behind the scenes.

programme.title: American Monster: In Sickness and in Health
programme.desc: When outgoing Beth Spaulding meets shy Jason Risenburg it seems that love has conquered loneliness and the two quickly marry. Illness and bad luck push their happiness to the brink, triggering a tornado of lies and deception that tears them apart.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Last Shop
programme.desc: On March 29, 2016, music loving Louise Dickey is discovered brutally murdered in a bath of her own blood. With no imaginable motive for the homicide and no witnesses, detectives seek out surveillance cameras to uncover the shocking truth.

programme.title: See No Evil: Stalking Cynthia
programme.desc: Cynthia Langrall is shot dead while out for morning jog through the Hillcrest Ranch neighborhood in Glendale, Arizona. Detectives obtain home surveillance footage, which helps to identify the murderer's vehicle, but may not lead to the actual killer.

programme.title: My Murder Story: The Search for Justice
programme.desc: In a secluded park located in Baltimore, Maryland, a disabled man is found shot to death in a public restroom. Now, his uncle, seeks clues to bring down the predators involved and faces opposition from a tight-lipped community.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Heartbreak Hotel
programme.desc: Beautiful Northwestern Airlines flight attendant Nancy Ludwig is discovered dead in her hotel room, her body mutilated and head almost decapitated. It will take the discovery of links to another heinous killing to blow the case wide open.

programme.title: See No Evil: Stalking Cynthia

programme.desc: On March 29, 2016, music loving Louise Dickey is discovered brutally murdered in a bath of her own blood. With no imaginable motive for the homicide and no witnesses, detectives seek out surveillance cameras to uncover the shocking truth.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Who Killed Kay Wenal?
programme.desc: Erin Moriarty takes viewers deep inside the investigation into a hard-to-close murder case and those investigators are asking the audience to help solve the murder of Kay Wenal.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Missing Marsha
programme.desc: A woman suddenly vanishes and is not reported missing for months, her hairdresser pushes for answers.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Target on Her Back
programme.desc: 24-year-old grocery store worker, Caroline Nosal befriends her introvert colleague Christopher O'Kroley. Chris is eager to make friends with Caroline possibly too eager. Caroline complains to store management about Chris things don't turn out as planned.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Living a Lie
programme.desc: Bob Peterson invites himself to his co-workers Gene and Jaye-Jaye Thurnau's new home to give them a housewarming present. That evening, Jaye-Jaye leaves the guys to run an errand.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Unfriendly Community
programme.desc: One June morning cleaning lady Myra heads into the property office and is confronted by a nightmare scene. The office has been ransacked and there is blood everywhere- property manager Melinda Schaefer is dead. Police work hard to get justice.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: Sandy Berfield was killed Jan 20, 2000. She suffered years of harassment from a co-worker and finally had him jailed for violating a restraining order. Released, he sent her a bomb. Steve Caruso was sentenced to life in prison with no parole.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Evil Blossoms
programme.desc: When Alisha Bromfield's supervisor, Brian Cooper, promotes her to team leader she should be ecstatic. But Brian's motives are not entirely good. Alisha stands her ground with Brian, letting him know she doesn't want a relationship beyond co-workers.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Never Predicted
programme.desc: When Andrea Farrington meets fellow employee Alex Kozak she thinks that romance could be on the horizon. She has no idea that feelings of romance will be replaced by suspicion and fear, leading to a final rejection that has fatal consequences.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Screaming Terror
programme.desc: Alice Hufnagle was raped and murdered on November 22. 2002. After following numerous leads and dead-ends, Police find the vital clues that lead them to Jeffery Vample, Alice's co-worker from a local Pharmacy.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Hell's Angel
programme.desc: When lonely teen Meagan Grunwald meets handsome 26-year-old felon Angel Garcia, it's love at first sight. But their whirlwind romance spirals into a hurricane of passion that leaves innocence destroyed and a trail of death and devastation in its path.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love or Lies
programme.desc: When a young woman is found murdered, her case goes unsolved for a year. A fortuitous arrest brings with it a new prime suspect, but an explosive confession of forbidden love causes everyone close to the case to reevaluate all they know.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Million Dollar Christy
programme.desc: A female boxing Phenom enters a forbidden relationship with her trainer. But when another secret passion bubbles to the surface and she tries to leave his controlling grip, she finds herself fighting for her life.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Bound by Honor
programme.desc: Love and tradition collide when a young woman forbidden from dating falls for a handsome stranger. She knows she must keep her relationship hidden from her orthodox father and protective brother.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bass Reeves: The Real Lone Ranger
programme.desc: Bass Reeves is no ordinary lawman. A slave set free by the Civil War, he hunts outlaws in the most dangerous territory in the nation. There is striking evidence that this fearless, legendary rider is the basis for the iconic character of the Lone Ranger.

programme.title: America's Code Breakers
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. But with uncrackable encryption available for your cell phone and computer, have U.S. code warriors finally met their match?

programme.title: America's Hidden Bunkers
programme.desc: Discover the real story behind America's secret bunkers. Ranging from backyard boxes to government mini-cities, underground bunkers have been a feature of warfare planning since the dawn of time. They have played an important role in America's history.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Alien Invasion
programme.desc: With the recent discovery of thousands of earth-like planets in the universe the search for intelligent alien life continues. Some astronomers warn, when we find it, we should be prepared for advanced hostile extra-terrestrial species capable of anything.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nostradamus
programme.desc: Nostradamus' prophecies have predicted some of the most dramatic and tragic events in history with chilling accuracy, and the worst to come. There are many among his followers who say that he was not sealing us to this fate, but warning us against it.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Planet X
programme.desc: A look at the giant hidden planet with a gravitational pull so strong that it would literally cause the earth to turn upside down.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nuclear Apocalypse
programme.desc: The Cold War might be long gone, but the nuclear threat has re-emerged. Meet nuclear preparedness enthusiasts as they dig their bunkers and stockpile supplies, determined to survive a threat that could become a global apocalypse.

programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera AKA El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the U.S. marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Cold War, Hot War

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Cold War II
programme.desc: By the end of the 70's, war between East and West has been raging for decades. Countless proxy wars have proven how destructive the Cold War can be. It's an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Revolution

programme.title: Containables: Container Home Away From Home
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen work to build a container home for the in-laws when they come to visit their new grandson. With only four weeks to complete the project, the couple must must tackle 20-foot and 40-foot containers.

programme.title: Containables: Hurricanes and Golf Balls
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen design and build a container home for a local couple's adopted son and fill it with fun features like a lofted bed, hydraulic TV winch and an outdoor fire pit. A second container has a custom workshop and a rooftop driving range.

programme.title: Containables: Stacking the Decks to a T
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen are eager to begin work on a very special container home that combines a unique design with the scenic beauty of South Texas. The home consists of three containers stacked to create a cantilevered look with multi-level decks.

programme.title: Containables: Containers of Staggering Size
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen want to change the way people think about container living and start by tackling their biggest build yet. They stagger two 40-foot containers and open the walls between them to create a massive great room.

programme.title: Containables: A Great Room With Great Views
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen raise the bar by taking on their biggest container home yet for a homeowner who wants a home where her entire family can bunk down and enjoy the amazing views her property affords.

programme.title: Containables: Deadlines and Due Dates
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen design a three-container structure in the Smoky Mountains of North Carolina. Dealing with tricky terrain and inclement mountain weather, the team enlists their families' help to install bowling alley wood countertops, patio doors and more.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Run Down Family Rental
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take on a rundown, family-owned 1939 craftsman. The project is an emotional journey for the duo as the bland home is transformed into a breath-taking abode with room expansions and some inspired flooring choices.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: The Kettle House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley get the opportunity to renovate a bizarre Galveston icon that may harbor a few surprises inside. The spaceship-shaped landmark is soon brimming with life as the Cordrays bring their unique charm to the one-of-a-kind house.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: 1913 Beach Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley find a rundown 1913 beach bungalow that's about to be demolished. They transform the small kitchen into a modern, open-concept space with vintage touches and restore the original hardwood floors and shiplap walls.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Mystery House
programme.desc: Michael surprises Ashley with an 1893 raised cottage that he purchased before seeing the full interior. The duo soon finds themselves in over their heads when they realize it's not quite the hidden gem Michael thought it was.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Duplex Conversion
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley learn that a coveted property is for sale while crabbing off the Galveston coast.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: The Pink Shack
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley have their work cut out for them while restoring a dilapidated 1914 fixer-upper. They create a light-filled breakfast nook and repurpose a vintage wooden sign to transform a quaint pink corner house.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1802 Farmhouse Overhaul
programme.desc: Jeff is challenged to bring out the history in an 1802 farmhouse that has had a number of questionable renovations throughout its 200 years. His clients want original stone and ceiling beams in the dining room and an overhaul of the fireplace.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1740s Mudroom From Scratch
programme.desc: Jeff is tasked with turning a couple's wide-open front porch into an enclosed mudroom that blends the 1740s stone portion of their home with the 1800s wood siding portion. He also uncovers a gorgeous stone fireplace while restoring the living room.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From West Coast to Wisconsin
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe starts the day off right with breakfast on a stick, and gets to down to business with the pink taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: My Fair Latte
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts off in Chippewa Falls, Wis., at the Northern Wisconsin State Fair. The Wisconsin woods are the inspiration for the loaded Campfire Burger, and the state's famous cheese curds make an appearance in the Hot Chick.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Feast of the Middle East
programme.desc: Middle Eastern cuisine comes from more than ten countries, making it some of the most diverse and popular food on the planet.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Best Meal Deal
programme.desc: You don't have to sacrifice incredible food experiences in order to save a buck. Antonia Lofaso keeps her wallet full with irresistible Mexican munchies in Venice Beach, Calif., Duff Goldman saves a ton as he takes on the enormous Orca Platter.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On Wheels
programme.desc: Ditch the four walls, head outside, and get your fill of those portable powerhouses known as food trucks. Jeff Mauro gets happy about an angry lobster sandwich from the Happy Lobster Truck in Chicago.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: More Than I Can Count!
programme.desc: Some special dishes are so good you can enjoy them over and over again. Andrew Zimmern has lost count of how many times he's indulged in the infamous barbecue chicken from Miss Myra's Pit Bar-B-Que in Birmingham, Ala.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Burger Bonanza
programme.desc: In this episode, Noah Cappe explores the huge variety of options carnival cooks have come up with to honor America's much loved sandwich. From classic beef burgers to exotic meats, buns made from pretzels and even donuts, these burgers will inspire you.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Pizza Party
programme.desc: On the fairground, Noah Cappe discovers some amazing pizzas in Georgia and Florida State.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bacon 2: The Sequel
programme.desc: Bacon is the star of its own blockbuster sequel and host Noah Cappe is at the front of line to savor even more bacon-tastic fairground favs.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Get Stuffed
programme.desc: This is an episode stuffed with foods that are stuffed. From spicy southern stuffed peppers to a sweet cherry stuffed dessert, Noah will indulge in some of the best stuffed sensations North America has to offer.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Borrowed Favourites
programme.desc: Sharing is caring, and the treats that family and friends love become personal favourites too! Robert Irvine takes his wife's advice and discovers the world's greatest omelet at Babystacks Cafe in Las Vegas, Nev.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Trigger Foods
programme.desc: We're losing all control and giving in to ultimate food cravings. Geoffrey Zakarian starts things off like never before with the most juicy and succulent roast chicken from New York City. Jonathon Sawyer takes it to the next level.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Yummy in the Middle
programme.desc: It's that ooey-gooey goodness in the middle that we just can't get enough of, so we're heading straight to the middle of things to see what greatness awaits. Jeff Mauro indulges in a 100-layer vanilla creme doughnut that's full of surprises.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Culinary Revolutions
programme.desc: There's no denying that some foods have revolutionized the culinary game while making stomachs happy. Scott Conant gives new meaning to an old favorite with an updated take on classic potato tots.

programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Infernal Internship of Mark Beaks
programme.desc: Huey competes with Dewey for a coveted internship with Duckburg's newest tech billionaire Mark Beaks, while Scrooge and Glomgold team up to take this annoying new competitor down.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Living Mummies of Toth-Ra
programme.desc: In a lost pyramid, Louie interprets a pharaoh's prophecy to his advantage, forcing Scrooge and Launchpad to convince a group of living mummies to rescue him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!
programme.desc: With Huey and Webby’s help, Fenton woos a punk rock scientist, only to uncover her dangerous plans for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer
programme.desc: Gloria gets stuck on an elevator with the Greens. Remy falls under the sway of an internet influencer.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Last Mabelcorn
programme.desc: A new threat leads Mabel to venture into the enchanted realm of the unicorns. Meanwhile, Dipper learns an unexpected twist about the enigmatic Bill Cipher.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Supersonic Sue
programme.desc: Big Hero 6 attempt to thwart a bank robbery and are defeated by Supersonic Sue, an old school roller-skating villain.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fear Not
programme.desc: Supersonic Stu busts his grandmother, Supersonic Sue, out of prison.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Tiny Dancer
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Last Crash of the Sunchaser!
programme.desc: Stuck on a precarious peak, the kids secretly search the plane for the final clue about Della's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Most Dangerous Game...Night!
programme.desc: When Louie’s quiet family game night goes wrong, the family deals with shrink rays, a secret civilization and an unhealthy competition.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Coffee Quest/ Phoenix Rises
programme.desc: When Big City faces a coffee bean shortage, Cricket and Gloria’s boss, Ms. Cho, challenges them to retrieve one of a few remaining sacks of coffee; When the Greens' dog, Phoenix, runs away from home, the family sets out to find her.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Reckoning Ball/ Clubbed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler returns to take revenge on the Greens, but is forced to apologize. Andromeda and Tilly follow Gloria to a club where they must 'cure' her of her amnesia.

programme.title: Movie: Juice

programme.desc: A poetic hairdresser must decide if she's ready to love again.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at Holly Lodge
programme.desc: A woman inherits the Evergreen Inn and Ski Lodge from her parents and starts a new tradition of spending every holiday there. While visiting she meets a family that will change her life.

programme.title: Movie: Picture a Perfect Christmas
programme.desc: A world-travelling photographer takes some time off at Christmas to care for her grandmother. While there, she meets her neighbour, who needs help caring for his young nephew, and love develops.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Town
programme.desc: A woman leaves behind a life in Boston to embark on a new adventure. Unbeknownst to her, she ends up on an unexpected detour that changes both her life, and her romantic future.

programme.title: Movie: Write Before Christmas
programme.desc: A woman writes special Christmas cards to those who inspired her.

programme.title: Movie: My Christmas Dream
programme.desc: A manager of a department store is determined to land a position in the new Paris location. She sets out to impress the store's owner by creating the best display in stores' history.

programme.title: Movie: 12 Gifts of Christmas
programme.desc: A woman is hired to become a personal shopper for an uptight, corporate executive. As they work together, she teaches him that Christmas has less to do with the money that is spent, and more to do with the people in your life.

programme.title: Movie: It's Christmas, Eve
programme.desc: A school superintendent is forced to make cutbacks during the holiday season. A chance encounter leads her to meet a man and his young daughter, which leads to an unexpected romance, and a new song for her repertoire.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at the Palace
programme.desc: A woman agrees to help put on a skating pageant for a Christmas obsessed kingdom. Her joy, and love for the sport, catches the eye of the king, and they instantly fall for each other.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Duet
programme.desc: Famous for their beloved Christmas duet, fate brings ex-music duo together over the holidays, just in time for the annual Yuletide Festival.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Connection
programme.desc: A flight attendant is asked to stay for Christmas by a family after she returns a package left on a plane by a passenger and misses her connection back home.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at Pemberley Manor
programme.desc: A rookie party planner works with a serious and all-business to put together a Christmas festival with help from a merrily enigmatic caretaker who looks like Santa. As the festival approaches, the spirit of the holidays may lead to a wish of love.

programme.title: Movie: Let It Snow
programme.desc: When a resort executive is sent to a newly purchased lodge in Maine with instructions to turn it into an ultra-modern resort, she finds a charming, successful lodge loaded with holiday spirit and makes a connection with the owner's handsome son.

programme.title: Movie: Check Inn to Christmas
programme.desc: A town's Christmas celebration is used to reunite two families to save an inn.

programme.title: Dance It Out: Billy Blanks, Jr and Jennifer Meet Fitness Duo, MoveU!
programme.desc: Dancing helped Jennifer Barrett's post-partum depression. Watch Fitness duo, MoveU, who teach and entertain.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: The five married couples must embrace vulnerability, revisit their past, and expose their deepest truths.

programme.title: Movie: Don't Wake Mommy
programme.desc: Molly is struggling with being a new mom, but after meeting Beth, things temporarily improve only to turn as Beth's dark intentions are brought to light.

programme.title: Movie: Killing Mommy
programme.desc: When their mother announces her plans to remarry and sell the family estate, twin sisters Juliana and Deb have different reactions to the news. Deb begins to threaten her mother’s happiness to the point of threatening her life.

programme.title: Movie: Mommy's Little Girl
programme.desc: Eleven year-old Sadie was raised in a remote country house by her controlling grandparents. Now finally reunited with her mother, she won't let anything, or anyone, get in the way of her new found happiness.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: Mommy's Dirty Deeds
programme.desc: Mike Williams mysteriously disappears on his wedding anniversary, and it looks like he may have been eaten by alligators. But looks can be deceiving. A break in the case reveals the married family man’s life wasn’t quite what he thought.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Micro-Clues
programme.desc: When a boy is found dead in a cornfield, traces of water from his body help lead investigators to the boy's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Parasites
programme.desc: In the spring of 1993, an unexplained illness struck the residents of Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Health officials suspected it was influenza, but it proved to be more serious and more difficult to identify.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Vows
programme.desc: Some of the refugees who sought asylum in the United States after World War II lied about the atrocities in which they’d participated. Years later, a high-ranking religious figure is suspected of war crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Knowledge
programme.desc: A police investigation reveals details about a missing woman's past that no one suspected: She was a student by day and a $100-an-hour call-girl by night. Her many clients were all suspects in her disappearance, as was her boyfriend.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Video Diary
programme.desc: When a gas station/ convenience store employee is found shot at point blank range, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's videotape security camera.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing in Time
programme.desc: A young woman was reported missing after a fight with her husband. She was presumed to be dead and her husband was the prime suspect. Police were suspicious of a secondary suspect when he reported a suspicious fire in his car.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In the summer of 1996, four women from South Bend, Indiana were sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Print Conviction
programme.desc: A woman leaves a bar with a stranger only to have her body discovered the next morning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Vow of Silence
programme.desc: When a man's friends report his mail-order bride missing, police soon orient their investigation around the husband. While following up on some leads, they dig up some evidence tying him to deaths of two other wives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Formula
programme.desc: The mother of a suspiciously murdered four-month-old was convicted, but an explanation for the death would come five months later from the most unlikely of sources: his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cement the Case
programme.desc: A man confesses to killing his wife, but forensic evidence may lead to another suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bio-Attack
programme.desc: A religious cult's bizarre plot to overthrow the government using germ warfare.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: A pregnant woman experiences severe morning sickness and suspects something is amiss.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her two top lieutenants disappeared with no shortage of suspects. Her abduction may never have been solved if it weren't for the discovery of a headless, handless body, and the serial number on an artificial hip.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Barn
programme.desc: When a popular handyman in a New Hampshire town is found murdered investigators follow forensic clues to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Micro-Clues
programme.desc: When a boy is found dead in a cornfield, traces of water from his body help lead investigators to the boy's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Parasites
programme.desc: In the spring of 1993, an unexplained illness struck the residents of Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Health officials suspected it was influenza, but it proved to be more serious and more difficult to identify.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Memories
programme.desc: A pregnant woman is brutally attacked in her own home and her unborn child is killed. After coming out of her coma, and regaining her memory, she identifies her husband as the perpetrator. A new DNA test lead investigators to a different suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Family Tree
programme.desc: After the brutal slaying of a young couple on a road trip, the victims’ families begin receiving disturbing letters.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kill'igraphy

programme.desc: Tempted by the largest nuggets he's ever seen, Parker ventures deep into an underground mine. Tyler tracks down a trommel for the team, and a local miner lets the team test a claim that yields more gold per yard than Parker's ever seen in the Yukon.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker's Trail: Tyler's Trial

programme.desc: The Fire Crew's season rests on a knife-edge as they struggle to battle their way back from a disastrous setback. The Opal Queen battles rock hard walls alone, desperate to find opal. The Boulder Boys abandon their drill and hunt for opal by hand.

programme.title: The Loud House: Net Gains/ Pipe Dreams

programme.title: The Loud House: Suite and Sour/ Back in Black

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: North Atlantic Convoy

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Trapped in a Blizzard

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Desert Heat
programme.desc: Celebrating their anniversary Rick and Cathy hiked a trail in the Texas desert. They lost track of their location and became dehydrated quickly. Cathy becomes unable to move and Rick becomes their only hope to survive.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Tacoma FD
programme.desc: As Eddie prepares to become a dad, the rest of the crew's wagering is out of control, forcing Terry to ban gambling. The crew finds creative ways to bet behind Chief's back, causing Lucy to fall into a hole of debt she can't climb out from.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Movie: Norbit
programme.desc: When mild-mannered Norbit meets the woman of his dreams, he must find the courage to stand up to his overbearing girlfriend.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Jeff Goldblum
programme.desc: Jeff Goldblum faces the wings of death while breaking down Jurassic Park lore and discussing his spiritual encounter with Quavo.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Jonas Brothers
programme.desc: The Jonas Brothers battle against the wings of death while discussing topics such as Met Gala hangouts with OBJ and Taylor Swift's anti-paparazzi techniques.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Chrissy Teigen
programme.desc: Chrissy Teigen licks her way through the wings of death while discussing memorable Twitter wars, the Medieval Times and a no-fail recipe for Thai ribs.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Adam Devine
programme.desc: Adam Devine patriotically challenges the wings of death; all while channeling Macho Man Randy Savage and his Pitch Perfect audition.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr dodge shakedowns with the help of some strangers, and tonight's loser has a run-in at a party that leaves him down for the count.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Immigration
programme.desc: Adam illustrates the big problem a border wall wouldn't address, explores the history of racist deportations, and explains how immigration courts are a huge mess.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Death
programme.desc: In the season finale, Adam explains that 'the end' is inevitable, shows why immortality is a fantasy, and reveals that the American funeral industry is a racket that exploits mourners' grief and fear of dying.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Voting
programme.desc: Adam explores the twisted history of the Electoral College, explaining that the Founding Fathers did not want most Americans to vote. He also takes a stab at fixing a political system that seems rigged against true democracy.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Weddings
programme.desc: A couple's wedding day is here, but Adam's gift of information, like the fact that most wedding 'traditions' were created by consumerism, may rain on the parade.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Hack to the Future
programme.desc: Go to the future with Kevin as he lives out his hoverboard dream, and watch Brooke and Kevin spot a hack that helps your sheets feel like a million bucks.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Hack-a-bye Baby
programme.desc: Officers Mack and Jack come to the rescue a perp who has a tough time being alone, and Kevin attempts to find out the sex of an unborn baby.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Awww Craps
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin see if they can game the system with a high stakes dice-throwing hack, and they test some surprising hacks for sleeping through the night.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Addicted to Hacks
programme.desc: Kevin and Brooke have dinner in a hot tub, and it's a blast from the past as Kevin re-hacks a self-tanner. Plus, our teens have let the hacks take over.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Conspiracy Theories
programme.desc: Adam debunks the fake moon landing theory, discusses the Satanic Panic of the 1980s and reveals how to spot a false theory.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Halloween
programme.desc: Strangers with poisoned candy don't exist, the panic over Orson Welles' War of the Worlds broadcast didn't happen and mediums are total frauds.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Future
programme.desc: Unregulated food expiration dates lead to massive waste, your 401K won't be enough to support your retirement and the future is unpredictable.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins America
programme.desc: Adam lets his freedom flag fly by examining why America doesn’t have higher rates of social mobility. He then uncovers the flaws within the constitution and examines the country’s progression and regression.

programme.desc: When Tristan starts showering Khloe with gifts, she worries his grand gestures are an effort to win her back. After Kim and Kourtney learn that people are being sickened by toxic waste in a nearby community, they vow to help.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Show Must Go On
programme.desc: Kim and Khloe are furious that Kourtney is hiding aspects of her life from the cameras and attempt to fire her from the show. Kim helps a young man recently out of prison with his future.

programme.desc: Kris takes the family to Wyoming in an effort to ease recent tension and strengthen their bond, but her plan backfires when the girls start fighting on the trip. Kendall is excited to spend some much-needed bonding time with Kylie.

programme.title: Movie: The Fast and the Furious
programme.desc: An undercover police officer infiltrates an L.A. street gang in order to crack a hijacking ring.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Unexpected Eats
programme.desc: Guy is in search of the most unique offerings of everyday favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Traditional Gone Wild
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's digging into some dishes like mama made, if she had a wild imagination.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Griddles n' Vittles
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's headed west for barbecue and beyond. In Los Angeles, a food court gem grills up homemade chorizo and a Yucatan turkey special. Then, in Las Vegas, Nevada, two funky joints fire up the grill.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cannoli, Fritters and Wings
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's rolling out for a festival of flavours. In Portland, Ore., the Guamanian food truck is serving up righteous shrimp fritters and a unique spin on chicken salad.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Worldwide Flavorfest
programme.desc: Guy starts this trip in Cincinnati at a Jamaican joint firing up their trademark jerk chicken and spicy snapper. Then, he stops ion Boston at a lunch place that is serving up authentic Italian.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Big Food, Small Towns
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's stopping in small towns to dig in to big-time eats. In Raymond, N.H., a blow-your-mind butchery loadin' up their burgers and crankin' out scratch-made corn dogs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Australian to Asian
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hitting the road and grabbing all kinds of worldwide flavour. In Kauai, Hawaii, a Japanese-Hawaiian spot putting a quick spin on fish, burgers and burritos. In Kansas City, Mo., an Australian bakery cookin' up Down Under comfort food.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From North To South America
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is diggin' into flavours that span the Americas. In Charlotte, N.C., he visits a brewery serving the bomb bacon jam burger and a dynamite duck confit flatbread. In Cancun, Mexico, a lights-out spot takes street tacos to a whole new level.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Savory Seafood and Square Pie
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's thinking outside the box. First up, he and his son, Hunter, check on an Italian spot in Boston dishing out double portions of their authentic eats.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Northern Southern
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is grabbing Southern flavour without ever hittin' the South. In Cambridge, Mass., a funky joint fryin' up Nashville hot chicken and cookin' up gangster gumbo. A smokin' spot in Sparks, Nev.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meat Sampler
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's digging into all kinds of different meats on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, a carnivore haven stackin' sandwiches with dynamite duck and a pork trifecta. In Richmond, Va., a taco joint loading up out-of-bounds oxtail.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cruisin' Capital Cities
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is checking out cuisine in capital cities, starting in Juneau, Alaska, at an Italian spot with an Alaskan twist pairing pappardelle with king crab. In Richmond, a classic deli cookin' modern tastes like duck pierogis and Jewish egg rolls.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Between the Bread
programme.desc: Guy's grabbin' grub piled high on bread and buns. In Colorado Springs, a funky joint is going scratch-made and local with their Pueblo chili burger and a hangover specialty. Then, Guy visits a family-run sandwich shop in Washington D.C.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Kickin' It in Cancun
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's headin' south of the border to dig into Cancun cuisine, like an authentic, family-owned spot where grandma's cookin' up real-deal rellenos and killer chicharron gorditas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Savory Seafood and Square Pie
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's thinking outside the box. First up, he and his son, Hunter, check on an Italian spot in Boston dishing out double portions of their authentic eats.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Northern Southern
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is grabbing Southern flavour without ever hittin' the South. In Cambridge, Mass., a funky joint fryin' up Nashville hot chicken and cookin' up gangster gumbo. A smokin' spot in Sparks, Nev.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meat Sampler
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's digging into all kinds of different meats on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, a carnivore haven stackin' sandwiches with dynamite duck and a pork trifecta. In Richmond, Va., a taco joint loading up out-of-bounds oxtail.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cruisin' Capital Cities
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is checking out cuisine in capital cities, starting in Juneau, Alaska, at an Italian spot with an Alaskan twist pairing pappardelle with king crab. In Richmond, a classic deli cookin' modern tastes like duck pierogis and Jewish egg rolls.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Between the Bread
programme.desc: Guy's grabbin' grub piled high on bread and buns. In Colorado Springs, a funky joint is going scratch-made and local with their Pueblo chili burger and a hangover specialty. Then, Guy visits a family-run sandwich shop in Washington D.C.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Kickin' It in Cancun
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's headin' south of the border to dig into Cancun cuisine, like an authentic, family-owned spot where grandma's cookin' up real-deal rellenos and killer chicharron gorditas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Australian to Asian
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hitting the road and grabbing all kinds of worldwide flavour. In Kauai, Hawaii, a Japanese-Hawaiian spot putting a quick spin on fish, burgers and burritos. In Kansas City, Mo., an Australian bakery cookin' up Down Under comfort food.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From North To South America
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is diggin' into flavours that span the Americas. In Charlotte, N.C., he visits a brewery serving the bomb bacon jam burger and a dynamite duck confit flatbread. In Cancun, Mexico, a lights-out spot takes street tacos to a whole new level.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Barbecue in the Big Apple
programme.desc: Michael Symon is joined by his good buddy Michael Strahan at their favorite New York City burger spot. They bounce around The Big Apple dining on meatball sliders, succulent St. Louis style ribs and pastrami-topped pizza.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Phenomenal Philly Food Feast
programme.desc: Nick Lachey hooks up with Michael Symon in Philadelphia, one of the best beer cities in the country with a food scene to match. From Chef Jose Garces' over-the-top bourbon burger, to true German smoked sausages.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Spring Ahead
programme.desc: The Kitchen is back with a menu refresh that includes spring flavors, tips and trends. Sunny Anderson starts with her recipe for quick onion and garlic shrimp with pasta, then Food Network Magazine's Maile Carpenter guest stars.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Cook With a Pro
programme.desc: Ina throws open the doors of her Hampton's home for more delicious food, dazzling ideas and good fun.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: The Art of Surprise
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis pulls off the ultimate surprise birthday party for a dear friend, featuring glittery decor and quiz-style party games.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Play Like A Girl
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood and her sister, Beth, volunteer for snack duty with the non-profit organization Play Like a Girl, which encourages girls to participate in sports to build confidence.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Burger Night Done Right
programme.desc: Skip the restaurant, stay home and make Rachael's Oklahoma-style smack burger in 30 minutes or less. Smashing slices of Vidalia onions into the patties and adding a simple sauce makes them juicy. On the side Rachael makes ranch-flavoured tater tots.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Best of Chicken All Ways
programme.desc: It's chicken, chicken and more chicken with great recipes from the ranch. Ree Drummond shares a Spatchcock Chicken Sheet Pan Supper, fabulous Peach Whisky Chicken, a Chicken Kale Caesar Salad kit and Slow Cooker Mexican Chicken Soup with all the fixings.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Haley's Having a Baby
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making freezer food for her friend and assistant Haley to enjoy after she has a baby. Ree assembles her mean green pasta casserole and a batch of white bean and sausage soup for easy dinners.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Freshen Up Your Flavors
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts are transforming winter dishes with fresh, seasonal flavours. Jeff Mauro starts with his parmesan-crusted chicken with grilled baby artichokes.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Broadway Down South
programme.desc: Worlds collide when Trisha Yearwood's talented friend, singer and actress Kristin Chenoweth, visits Nashville for a Southern Broadway experience.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Money-Saving Meals
programme.desc: Guy Fieri believes you don't need to break the bank to make delicious food, so he's invited his chef friends to the ranch to cook a frugal meal that's full of flavor. Aarti Sequeira makes a budget-friendly rice and lentil dish called Kichidi.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Diners, Drive-Ins And Dives Tournament 2: Part 1
programme.desc: Sixteen of the best DDD chefs compete in Flavortown for another epic 'Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives' tournament. Four chefs kick things off by putting a new spin on classic apple pie by flipping its ingredients into dinner.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Diners, Drive-Ins And Dives Tournament 2: Part 2
programme.desc: The tournament continues as four more DDD chefs try to win a Flavortown shopping spree and a spot in the finale. Making a hot sandwich sounds easy until the chefs find out that one of the key ingredients is out of stock!

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Diners, Drive-Ins And Dives Tournament 2: Part 3
programme.desc: Round three of the Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives Tournament features four more of Guy Fieri's favorite DDD chefs making classic diner meals.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Diners, Drive-Ins And Dives Tournament 2: Part 4
programme.desc: Four more DDD chefs compete to earn up to $20,000 plus the last spot in the Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives Tournament finale. First, they must make a belly-busting lunch despite the express lane's seven item limit.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Buy Curious
