programme.title: The King of Queens: Present Tense
programme.desc: When the Heffernans receive an oil painting of themselves as an anniversary gift from Deacon and Kelly, they dislike the picture so much that they decide to stage a robbery rather than hang the painting in their home.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fight Schlub
programme.desc: When Doug starts hanging out with Joe, a driver at Priority Plus, his fellow drivers lose all respect for him. Later, Doug discovers that Joe was only acting like his friend to get him alone so that he and his fellow drivers could play a trick on Doug.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Moxie Moron
programme.desc: Doug takes on a supervisory role at IPS just to prove to Carrie that he's not content with being a driver for the rest of his life. Meanwhile, Carrie decides to show her bosses that she has moxie by complaining about the company holiday gift.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Major Disturbance
programme.desc: While reading a bedtime story to Deacon's son, Doug changes the ending to make it a little scarier and ends up traumatizing the boy. Meanwhile, Arthur offers himself up as a passenger for hire so people can ride in the carpool lane.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Ruff Goin'
programme.desc: When Doug and Carrie are not invited to their block party, Doug makes an appearance to prove they are good people, but ends up having to adopt a dog from his neighbour in order to prove it. Meanwhile, Arthur offers to help Danny with his gambling problem.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Brace Yourself
programme.desc: When Deacon's son draws a picture of Arthur with crooked teeth, Arthur convinces Doug and Carrie to pay for new braces. However, when Doug attempts to use a similar strategy on Carrie, his plan backfires. Meanwhile, Spence is hired as a cook and maid.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Home Cheapo
programme.desc: When Carrie learns that Deacon and Kelly bought a second home, she convinces Doug that they were able to afford it because they are so cheap.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Offensive Fowl
programme.desc: Carrie is supportive at first of Doug's cleaner approach to life, but quickly grows tired of him trying to force his new beliefs on her and having to eat meat while in private.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mild Bunch
programme.desc: A prank runs amok when Doug and his pal reunite at their 20th high school reunion and decide to have some fun with their old principal.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: A Goldberg Thanksgiving
programme.desc: As a bet, Beverly challenges Erica to participate in Jazzercise after she thinks her mom's obsession is lame. When she wins, Erica decides to opt out of celebrating Thanksgiving so Beverly must find a way to win her daughter back.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: I Rode a Hoverboard!
programme.desc: Adam breaks his arm and exaggerates at school that he fell off of a hover board just like in the 'Back to the Future' movie.

programme.title: Roseanne: Husbands and Wives
programme.desc: Roseanne is up to her usual schemes. First, she cons Darlene out of a portion of her monthly allowance. Then, she plots to reunite Fred and Jackie. There's one glitch - Jackie's not sure she wants Fred back!

programme.title: Roseanne: Happy Trailers
programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan secretly attempt to help Becky and Mark with money after they move into a shabby trailer. A further case for concern is the couple's boozy trailer-park neighbor, Sharon.

programme.title: Roseanne: The Blaming of the Shrew
programme.desc: D.J.'s first date is with a domineering young girl to a school dance, which Jackie suggests reflects Dan and Roseanne's marriage. Meanwhile, Fred and Jackie go to therapy to work out their marital problems.

programme.title: Roseanne: The Birds and the Frozen Bees
programme.desc: When D.J. reveals that he can bring frozen bees back to life, Jackie decides to conduct a few experiments of her own. Also, Darlene realizes that she's never stopped loving David.

programme.title: Roseanne: Couch Potatoes
programme.desc: The Conners become a Nielsen family. Jackie and Fred decide to end their marriage.

programme.title: Roseanne: Sherwood Schwartz: A Loving Tribute
programme.desc: Dan's dream of building a boat leads to an episode full of fantasy and fun - Gilligan's Island style. Additionally, David graduates high school, and Darlene's unhappy about his summer plans.

programme.title: Roseanne: Shower the People You Love With Stuff
programme.desc: As the baby's birth approaches, the Conner family makes plans for the new arrival.

programme.title: Roseanne: Let Them Eat Junk

programme.title: Roseanne: Roseanne in the Hood

programme.title: Roseanne: Halloween: The Final Chapter

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Another Bite: Ice Breaker
programme.desc: Steve Irwin takes us on a frozen adventure to Antarctica to interact with amazing wildlife. He goes tobogganing with penguins, encounters notoriously dangerous leopard seals and swims with two curious humpback whales.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Another Bite: River of the Dammed
programme.desc: Steve travels to Central America as a guest of the Belize Zoo. Dropped by helicopter into a remote area of the Macal River, Steve tracks down a colony of morelet crocodiles and encounters the venomous fer-de-lance snake.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Another Bite: Whale Sharks of the Wild West
programme.desc: Steve, Terri, and Bindi set out on a luxury cruiser to navigate the rugged coast of Western Australia. On their coastal adventure, they swim with marine animals, dive shipwrecks, and explore islands full of wildlife.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Another Bite: Confessions of the Crocodile Hunter
programme.desc: This exclusive Animal Planet special features never-before-seen footage and candid interviews with Steve Irwin.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Another Bite: Crocodile Coast
programme.desc: Steve, Terri, and Bindi continue their adventure along Western Australia's coast. They encounter wild crocs in the thick oozy mud of the Kimberley Coast and on a remote reef, Steve dives with sea snakes and hungry sharks.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Best of Steve Irwin: Steve and the Dragon
programme.desc: Steve Irwin comes face-to-face with the largest living lizard in the world, the Komodo dragon, on the remote islands of Indonesia. These huge powerful reptiles seem lazy and docile, most of the time.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Best of Steve Irwin: Crocodiles of the Revolution
programme.desc: In East Timor, the Australian Army discovered two crocodiles living in appalling conditions. Steve and his team from Australia Zoo are called to undertake a death-defying crocodile rescue.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Best of Steve Irwin: Surfing Snakes
programme.desc: Steve and his best mate Wes set out on an adventure through the wild islands of Indonesia looking for the best surf. Both accomplished surfers, the pair encounter some of the more venomous snakes of Indonesia as well as lizards and mischievous monkeys.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Best of Steve Irwin: Reptiles of the Lost Continent
programme.desc: A journey into the forests of Madagascar reveals the varied species of chameleons that have evolved in mysterious ways on this ancient island. Steve locates the smallest and largest of this amazing reptile family.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Best of Steve Irwin: Casper the White Crocodile
programme.desc: Thhe Australia Zoo team is relocating eleven of their spunkiest crocodiles into their new exhibit areas. However, Casper, the latest edition might prove to be Steve's biggest challenge yet.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Best of Steve Irwin: Search for the Super Croc
programme.desc: Crocodiles have always been known as the invisible predator and very little has been know about their movements and habits. In this Australian adventure, Steve attempts to unmask these secret reptiles that have survived for over 60 million years.

programme.title: Death Row Chronicles: The Rise of Death Row
programme.desc: Dr. Dre discovers Snoop Dogg. Suge's Death Row team releases The Chronic and Doggystyle which are huge hits. Money pours in and everyone's lives change. Snoop faces murder charges.

programme.desc: We follow Tupac's transformation from street poet to activist then hard core gangsta rapper at Death Row. Tupac's legal trouble mount and he faces prison time. Suge declares war and East/ West beef escalates.

programme.title: Death Row Chronicles: East vs. West

programme.desc: A notorious hitman who is set to testify against a ruthless dictator becomes targeted by his goons and assassins. In order to stay alive and make it to The Hague he has to team up with the government agent who's been a thorn in his side for years.

programme.desc: Inventive owners convert historic buildings into one-of-a-kind homes. Explore a Kentucky bourbon distillery whose crumbling stone walls are now the centerpiece of an amazing country home.

programme.desc: A professional poker player with a total winning pot of $4 million is ready to go 'all in' on a huge family home along Philadelphia's Main Line area.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Lucky in Las Vegas
programme.desc: After a man hits it big in Las Vegas on his wife's birthday, a couple is ready to find a quiet spot where they can raise their family away from the bright lights of the Strip.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Newlywed Millionaires
programme.desc: After these newlyweds bought a lotto ticket at a gas station, they filled up both their gas tank and their bank account. They are on the hunt for their dream home in Columbus, Ohio, where they can start a family.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Winner Winner Chicken Dinner
programme.desc: Patty won $1 million on a scratch-off and is beside herself with excitement to find the house of her dreams with the help of David Bromstad. Patty and her sister-in-law target the upmarket suburb of Spring Hill, Florida, for their search.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Follow Your Nose
programme.desc: After winning $1 million on a quick pick Powerball ticket, a woman and her husband call on David Bromstad to help find their forever home. The house must come with a certain smell, however, challenging David to find one that passes her sniff test.

programme.desc: A couple's big win was the break they desperately needed to move out of their cramped basement rental and give their two children a better life. David Bromstad helps them search the suburbs outside Boston for the perfect family dream home.

programme.desc: Demolition man John beat the odds and won $10 million on a Massachusetts scratcher. Now, he's ready to kick off his work boots and retire into flip-flops in Hollywood, FL.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Beach House Perfection
programme.desc: After accidentally picking up a Megaplier instead of his usual weekly lottery ticket, Andy won a whopping $5 million. He's asked David to help him find the perfect beach house for his family to enjoy in North Carolina.

programme.desc: Bill and Eric hit the jackpot on the St. Patrick's Day lottery and couldn't believe their good luck. Now, the happy couple and their twins need help finding a larger family home on Chicago's classy North Shore.

programme.title: Ghost Nation: The Novelist's Nightmare

programme.desc: A bank executive tries to rob his own bank. Investigators think it is an inside job but eventually learn the crime is connected to a spree carried out by men who managed to keep their identities secret, praying on people who did the opposite.

programme.desc: Friends in New Orleans hit the town looking for a night of fun. But by sunrise, one of them is found dead in the trunk of a burned-out car. No one escapes suspicion, but it's the victim's own words that eventually help bring down her killer.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Dead of Winter
programme.desc: During a cold Minneapolis winter, a night out with good friends takes a dark turn when one of them disappears. Days later, when human remains are discovered, investigators travel a chilling path to catch a killer before another night ends in murder.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Acting On Evil
programme.desc: After a Wisconsin cast party, a mother makes an unimaginable discovery. Suddenly, a close circle of friends is under suspicion for murder. As detectives work quickly to unravel this mystery, another vicious attack may lead them to their killer.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Inside Job
programme.desc: In Hamburg, NY, employees at the local Toys 'R' Us are faced with the unthinkable when one of their own is savagely killed during an otherwise typical nightshift. Suddenly, every co-worker is a suspect, but is one masking as a murderer?

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Mother's Day Murder
programme.desc: A rowdy night out at a Chicago pub turns deadly when daybreak reveals a mutilated body. Police cross state lines as they try to track a killer, but it will take an unexpected call and a brutal betrayal to finally solve this case and find justice.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Party Crashers
programme.desc: Some college buddies crash a party in an idyllic Southern California town. But when alcohol flows and jealousy rages, the night turns deadly. The case goes cold for more than a decade before the truth is finally uncovered and justice is served.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Smokey Mountain Murders
programme.desc: It's quitting time in the Smokey Mountains of Tennessee and a group of fellas bellies up to a local bar. But when moods shift, someone will wind up dead. And when another local mysteriously goes missing, neighbors fear a killer is hiding among them.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: After a night shift, an Indiana college student heads home. Hours later, and a mile away, her car is found abandoned. And when two horrifying discoveries are soon made, investigators wonder if they're dealing with a small town serial killer.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Gambling With Death
programme.desc: An evening at a Mississippi casino turns into a nightmare when a beautiful wife and mother is abducted. When investigators uncover some startling truths the suspects are countless. But it's a shocking twist that finally leads to an unexpected arrest.

programme.desc: After a night shift, an Indiana college student heads home. Hours later, and a mile away, her car is found abandoned. And when two horrifying discoveries are soon made, investigators wonder if they're dealing with a small town serial killer.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Family Betrayal
programme.desc: Kelly travels to Abbey Abbondandolo’s home state to work with the Idaho Falls PD to help investigate the 2007 homicide of a young mother. When her body was discovered almost 3 years later outside the city, it left a family searching for her killer.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Texas Tragedy
programme.desc: Kelly and Johnny Bonds work with the Jasper County Sheriff's Department to take on the 2012 disappearance of a 56-year-old mother. The investigation uncovers family drama, rumors of doomsday prepping and a daughter waiting for her mother to return.

programme.title: Snapped: Angela Ferguson
programme.desc: When the body of a beloved aircraft machinist is found stuffed in the trunk of his own car, investigators follow a trail of deception to a manipulative killer.

programme.title: Snapped: Angelina O’Mara
programme.desc: In the fall of 2011, homicide detectives in towns over two-hundred miles apart connect two separate murders to one ruthless killer.

programme.title: Snapped: Julene Simko
programme.desc: When the owner of an Ohio landscaping company is found shot to death in his bed, the ensuing investigation exposes an elaborate web of sex, obsession, and power.

programme.title: Snapped: Jackie Ray
programme.desc: A homicide investigation in Gig Harbor, Washington reveals the dark lengths one woman will go to for her family's safety.

programme.title: Movie: A Dog's Purpose
programme.desc: A dog looks to discover his purpose through several owners and lifetimes. He spends each of his lives showing humans how to laugh and love, until in one of his lifetimes he ends up back with his original owner. He does his best to make his owner remember.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Girls Just Want to Have Sums
programme.desc: Springfield is in an uproar after Principal Skinner makes a sexist comment at the end of an Itchy and Scratchy musical. Principal Skinner is replaced by Melanie Upfoot, a women's education expert, who divides the school into two different schools.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Regarding Margie
programme.desc: After a spring-cleaning frenzy and inhaling too many fumes, Marge suffers from retrograde amnesia. In an effort to bring back her memory, Homer takes her around town to re-familiarize her with her surroundings.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Monkey Suit
programme.desc: After visiting an evolution exhibit, Flanders pushes Mayor Quimby to appoint Reverend Lovejoy as a "Morality Czar"' in charge of spreading the theory of creationism. Darwin's theories are outlawed and Lisa is the only supporter of the theory.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Marge and Homer Turn a Couple Play
programme.desc: After a passionate kiss between Marge and Homer airs on the Isotope Jumbotron, struggling second baseman Buck Mitchell turns to the couple for marital advice. The Simpsons are able to get Buck and his sexy singing wife, Fiona, on track.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Mook, the Chef, the Wife and Her Homer
programme.desc: After Lisa befriends Fat Tony's son Michael, Fat Tony invites the Simpsons over for dinner as a sign of gratitude. Shockingly, Fat Tony is shot by a rival family moments after Michael admits he would rather be a chef than take over the family business.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XVII
programme.desc: A meteor falls to Earth and reveals a green goo that Homer mistakes for marshmallow. Bart brings Golem to life and forces him to carry out his bidding. A radio broadcast convinces the people of Springfield that they're in the midst of an alien invasion.

programme.title: The Simpsons: G.I. D'oh
programme.desc: After Bart gets out of a commitment to join the army at 18, Homer falls prey to a couple of army recruiters and lands himself in basic training. Homer, of course, treats it like summer camp and infuriates his hard-nosed colonel.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Moe'N'A Lisa
programme.desc: When Homer forgets Moe's birthday, Moe's anger inspires Lisa to write about him for her school report. She finds a poetic side to Moe and helps him get published in 'American Poetry Perspectives.'

programme.title: The Simpsons: Ice Cream of Margie (With the Light Blue Hair)
programme.desc: After Homer gets fired at the nuclear power plant, he takes over the ice cream truck business, while a depressed Marge creates popsicle stick sculptures to keep busy. The sculptures quickly become popular and Marge is excited to have a purpose in life.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Kill Gil, Volumes 1 & 2

programme.desc: A mother and nursing student stops her anxiety medication abruptly, causing her to become delusional. After breaking into a home and stealing a car, she leads police on a high-speed pursuit.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Maston/ Young

programme.title: The Killer Speaks: Twisted Love: Dena Riley
programme.desc: Dena Riley met convicted rapist Richard Davis, and they shared the same twisted desire for three-way sex--followed by murder.

programme.title: The Killer Speaks: Monster Inside: Robert Lopez
programme.desc: Robert Lopez served 10 years for nearly killing his first girlfriend. When his next girlfriend gave him reason to doubt her affection, he murdered her. He speaks about the source of his rage.

programme.title: The Killer Speaks: Gene Meredith: Devil Inside
programme.desc: In Great Falls, Mont., a 51-year-old corrections officer is found dead. This is the second random murder in six weeks. The detectives being the hunt for the killer in hopes to stop him before he hurts anyone else.

programme.title: Rookies: Tampa: A Deer in Headlights
programme.desc: An officer gets his wish and becomes part of the action.

programme.title: My Evil Sister: Dead Ringer/ My Sister's Keeper
programme.desc: Neighbours always mix up sisters Sarah and Stevie, but their polar-opposite personalities is what set them apart in the end. Elena and Christina were both adopted, but these teenage sisters love, laugh, and battle like blood relatives.

programme.title: My Evil Sister: Lose a Sister, Gain a Husband/ The Sinner and the Saint
programme.desc: When a friendly neighbor marries barely legal Linda, he rescues her from abject poverty, and invites her sister, Patti, into their twisted relationship.

programme.title: My Evil Sister: Murder by Minivan/ Lose a Sister Gain a Baby
programme.desc: When Teresa's brother marries Betty Jo, the young bride becomes the sister Teresa was always dying for.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love or Family
programme.desc: A high school romance must be kept a secret from a domineering father with traditional values. When the truth comes out, a heartbreaking choice between love and family brings devastating consequences.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Married With Secrets
programme.desc: The dark past of a college student's new husband rears its ugly head and ends in a double homicide.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Good Deed Punished
programme.desc: A Christian couple open up their home to a young woman in need of a helping hand. But their act of charity has unexpected consequences when emotional support gives way to physical attraction and a lustful affair turns deadly.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Flirting With Murder
programme.desc: When Trichele and Brian promise to stick it out for better or for worse, they have no idea how 'worse' things will get. Their passionate love easily flips to bitter hate when the parties, drinking, and recriminations escalate until one of them is dead.

programme.title: Body Cam: Worst Case Scenario
programme.desc: A relationship breakup turns deadly; a minor traffic stop puts a child's life at stake; a killer on the run leaves a State Trooper fighting for his life.

programme.title: Body Cam: Up Against the Clock
programme.desc: Police are hunting two suspects, responsible for a string of armed robberies; an undercover cop foils a double murder for hire plot; a known felon tries to force an officer off the road, stopping at nothing to escape arrest.

programme.title: Body Cam: Disorderly Conduct
programme.desc: A police officer tracks down an armed carjacker and comes under heavy fire. A stabbing in broad daylight forces the police to take decisive action. A routine traffic stop results in an officer being shot and fighting for his life.

programme.title: Body Cam: Worst Case Scenario
programme.desc: A relationship breakup turns deadly; a minor traffic stop puts a child's life at stake; a killer on the run leaves a State Trooper fighting for his life.

programme.title: Body Cam: Up Against the Clock
programme.desc: Police are hunting two suspects, responsible for a string of armed robberies; an undercover cop foils a double murder for hire plot; a known felon tries to force an officer off the road, stopping at nothing to escape arrest.

programme.title: Body Cam: Disorderly Conduct
programme.desc: A police officer tracks down an armed carjacker and comes under heavy fire. A stabbing in broad daylight forces the police to take decisive action. A routine traffic stop results in an officer being shot and fighting for his life.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Flirting With Murder
programme.desc: When Trichele and Brian promise to stick it out for better or for worse, they have no idea how 'worse' things will get. Their passionate love easily flips to bitter hate when the parties, drinking, and recriminations escalate until one of them is dead.

programme.title: Dark Minds: The I-70 Killer
programme.desc: In the spring of 1992 a serial killer cut a swath through the Mid West. Six victims across three states, shot execution style. The victims all worked in small stores just blocks from the I-70. Why the freeway? Why did he start, and what made him stop?

programme.title: Dark Minds: Blond, Blue-Eyed, and Gone
programme.desc: Four young girls go missing in Massachusetts and Connecticut. Some turn up dead, some are never seen again. They all have one thing in common: blond hair and blue eyes. But are they connected in another way? Are they victims of the same serial killer?

programme.title: Grave Secrets: Bottom of the Stairs
programme.desc: Detectives called to the home of Ken and Kristine Fitzhugh learn that what was once considered an accidental fall is now being investigated as a homicide. They soon find themselves on the hunt for the real scene of Kristine's death... and for her killer.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: Secret Vows
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Devon Guzman is found dead in the backseat of her car, it sends shockwaves through her grieving community. But detectives soon discover Devon's love life was a time bomb-- a web of jealousy and betrayal that seemed destined for disaster.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: The Manner of Murder
programme.desc: Everyone in town adores Sara Dixon, and police are baffled when they discover her shot dead in her sleep. Their only clue: Christmas tinsel that the killer tracked in. Rumors of a secret family feud will soon reveal a story of monstrous betrayal.

programme.title: The Interrogator: Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: When two Yellow Cab drivers are murdered in under a week, the city of Houston is thrown into a frenzy. Detective Fil Waters soon learns that there are recordings of the same female voice luring the drivers to their deaths.

programme.title: The Interrogator: Like Mother, Like Daughter
programme.desc: A young mother is strangled to death in her bedroom while her young son sleeps. As Detective Fil Waters digs into the mystery, he soon learns the victim's own mother was murdered twenty-five years earlier.

programme.title: The Interrogator: You Know What Time It Is
programme.desc: A mother of two is shot to death outside her apartment complex just minutes after returning home from her 30th birthday celebration. After interviewing multiple witnesses and suspects, Detective Fil Waters uncovers a shocking lead caught on video.

programme.title: The Interrogator: Overkill
programme.desc: A young woman finds her beloved neighbour, Rebecca Claybrook, beaten to death in her own home. The men in Claybrook's life are put under the microscope by Detective Fil Waters.

programme.title: The Interrogator: The Murders at Immaculate Auto Sales
programme.desc: Three members of a tight-knit family are brutally murdered in broad daylight while working at their family owned car dealership. After an intense four-month investigation, Fil Waters boils it down to a scorned woman and an eyewitness who saw the killer.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Connecticut Horror Story
programme.desc: One summer night in 2007 comes as a nightmare for the Petit family when woken up by two strangers in their quiet, peaceful home of Cheshire, Connecticut. Suddenly this family of four finds themselves held hostage and in a fight for their lives.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Where Is Baby DeOrr?
programme.desc: A young couple enjoys an impromptu camping trip in Leadore, Idaho, until their 2-year-old son suddenly vanishes. Investigators and private detectives work around the clock to find the missing boy, only to point the finger back at the parents.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Gone in 90 Seconds
programme.desc: When an 11-year-old Arizona girl vanishes while waiting for an ice cream truck, it's clear she's been abducted. The search for her leads to a trail of suspects, making it the largest missing child investigation in Arizona history.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Monumental Realities
programme.desc: The myths behind some of history's most defining moments are uncovered, as well as revealing facts behind America's space explorations.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Epic Inventions
programme.desc: On this special edition, learn the real story behind the most famous flying devices in history and the truth behind our most influential inventors.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Take Down My Ex-Boyfriend
programme.desc: Donna Schatz went on the run after carrying out a violent vendetta on her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Be the 'Green Baron'
programme.desc: Tony Darwin makes millions piloting marijuana into Florida. Even after getting caught, he continues works for a notorious smuggler until a deadly plane crash forces him to flee the country.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape Through an Air Duct
programme.desc: After killing a man, ex-con Rondell Reed crashes his getaway car and is sent to prison. He and his cellmate escape by squeezing through an air duct. Once free, he steals and carjacks his way north to Ohio where another chase leads to another car crash.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Be a Ladies' Man
programme.desc: David Corbin is a career criminal. After a stint in prison, Corbin launches a crime wave, stealing cars and selling them for a profit. But when a jealous girlfriend rats him out, Corbin is caught and sent to prison where he pulls off a daring escape.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Death Certificate
programme.desc: After witnessing a murder, Anthony Ragno goes on the run. Building a new life trafficking pot in the Haitian islands, a coke addiction and close calls with local governments drive Ragno back to the US with a fake name.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: All-American Landmarks

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Defending the Truth

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Engineering America

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Fall into the Truth

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1782 Farmhouse Redo
programme.desc: Jeff Devlin and his crew are called in to transform a dated kitchen and unfunctional dining room in a 1700s farmhouse.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1825 Family Room Fix
programme.desc: Jeff is tasked to restore a crumbling family room and adjacent sun room in an 1825 stone home. He and his team bring in a stunning bluestone floor and create tons of built-in storage. They transform the sun room into an airy home office.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1735 Master Bedroom Retreat
programme.desc: Jeff meets up with a homeowner to restore the living room and bedroom in the oldest portion of her 1735 stone home. Jeff lowers an historic mantel in the living room and turns the master into a retreat with a wall of stone.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1700s Entryway Transformation
programme.desc: A couple calls on Jeff Devlin and his team to restore their historic dining room and exterior facade. Jeff adds tons of historic charm to the exterior and completely transforms the dining room with a custom-built mud room nook.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1798 Living Room Switch
programme.desc: A couple with a home built in 1798 enlists Jeff to transform their original living room into a dining room to fit their growing family. Then, Jeff and the crew uncover an amazing surprise while stripping down an original wood mantel.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1800s Dining Room Discoveries
programme.desc: A couple calls on Jeff to restore every ounce of character he can find in their historic home. They also want him to bring a little history into their 1970s living room addition. Jeff finds not one, but two big surprises hidden in the dining room.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Galveston Getaway

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Crystal Beach, Here We Come!

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Newlyweds Renovate Down the Shore
programme.desc: Newlyweds Jamie and Emily both grew up going to the Jersey Shore for family vacations. Now they're looking for a beachside bargain that they can renovate, but that might be tough to come by near the beaches of the Greater Atlantic City.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Johnny Jett Special
programme.desc: Machinist, artist and craftsman Johnny Jett is honoured by The Barnwood Builders in this one-hour special. Johnny's most unforgettable moments are highlighted as well as previously unaired footage featuring West Virginia's favorite Renaissance man.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Grandma's Cabin
programme.desc: Mark and the guys save the logs from a fire-damaged home in West Virginia. Mark promises the family who sold him the cabin that he will honor their history here. Once the logs are salvaged, the cabin is rebuilt on the Boneyard for a client in Montana.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Perfect Cabin, Perfectly Restored
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders discover one of the finest cabins they've ever seen. They take it down in West Virginia, then restore it in South Carolina. Mark returns to see the amazing home fully finished.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Digger's Cabin: The Whole Story
programme.desc: This one-hour special follows the whole story of how the Barnwood Builders transformed Digger's cabin into David's dream home, from a muddy take-down in West Virginia to a tricky build in Texas, and a remarkable finished result.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: New Hampshire Barn: The Whole Story
programme.desc: This one-hour special follows the move of a massive 1802 timber frame barn from New Hampshire to South Carolina, from complicated take-down, through an epic build, all the way to the dramatic finish visit.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Shaky Ground
programme.desc: Three new build teams arrive to their build sites and begin work on their unique cabins in the remote Alaskan wilderness. Josh Tousignant and his crew make the long trip to Cordova to begin building the foundation for their clients' two-story cabin.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Anything Can Go Wrong
programme.desc: At Trinity Lake, Chris and Joe battle an 80-foot spruce that begins to fall too soon before a helicopter delivery almost goes wrong. John and Heather fall behind while building the floor of their cabin due to the rain and need to get back to schedule.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Up High Without a Net
programme.desc: Chris Maynard and team prepare for two intense helicopter deliveries of roof rafters and Greg precariously scales a raised rake wall to nail it into place. John and Heather are finishing the roof by installing insulation and metal sheeting.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Playing Catch Up
programme.desc: All three builds are running behind schedule and must rush to get ahead. John and Heather build a water catchment system but discover they aren't getting enough water pressure, Chris Maynard's windows are delivered by helicopter in strong winds.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Not for Beginners
programme.desc: Time is running out for the builders to complete their projects. Chris gets help installing solar panels and sets up cameras to watch for bears. Meanwhile, Josh works on the custom log stairs as Jeremy takes his time to cut and build custom windows.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship: Rainy Day Sweets
programme.desc: The four remaining bakers must make whoopie pie critters you'd find in a garden.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Local Legends

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Tongue Twister
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro tries Warheads Extreme Sour Hard Candy, a treat that almost requires a warning label, sees how Frank's RedHot gets its heat and takes a peek at a dynamite mole sauce from Rico Chicken Tamales.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Layers Of Flavors

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Inside Job
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro discovers how they get the filling on the inside by watching how Parla chicken and spinach ravioli is made. Then he gets the lowdown on Lovely Candy Company's superfruit chews and finds out what's in a Colt's Bolt.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: It's A Rainbow
programme.desc: It's a kaleidoscope of color as Alfonso Ribeiro finds out how RW Garcia make their tortilla chips so vibrantly red. Then it's off to Amy's Kitchen for their multicolored, palate-pleasing Thai Red Curry Bowl.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Sweet Sensations

programme.desc: Rejected by Squidward, SpongeBob decides to make his own Squid ventriloquist dummy.

programme.desc: Bob and Pat accidentally launch Sandy's rocket ship into space; boots in lieu of pay.

programme.desc: Squidward lets Bob eat an exploding pie; Plankton disguises himself as Mr. Krabs.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Yours, Mine and Mine/ Kracked Krabs
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick buy a toy and have to learn to share it.

programme.desc: It's Harl Hubbs Day and Harl decides to help the whole city, but quickly discovers he wasn't prepared for Harl mania. Billy's mother, Ann, accepts a junkyard race challenge against the city's street racing legend, Tread Octane.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Nitwitting/ The Ballad of Filthy Muck

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Handemonium/ Breakin'
programme.desc: SpongeBob takes his first break.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Plankton's Old Chum/ Stormy Weather
programme.desc: The place that Plankton usually dumps his rotten chum is too full, so he tricks SpongeBob into hiding it around the city.

programme.title: Henry Danger: The Fate of Danger: Part II
programme.desc: Kid Danger and Captain Man battle Drex atop a blimp to stop him from erasing Swellview's memory of Captain, but one hero must stay behind when the blimp heads straight for the Swellview Baby Hospital.

programme.desc: Captain Man has a new crew of superhero sidekicks, Danger Force, but when he tells them there's a 'crime drought' in Swellview, they begin to suspect that he's fighting crime without them.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pineapple Invasion/ Idiot Sauce
programme.desc: When SpongeBob hides the secret formula in his home, it's up to Gary to protect it from Plankton. When a freak accident causes everyone in town to become as stupid as Patrick, Sandy must save the day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Plankton Paranoia/ Library Cards
programme.desc: Plankton hasn't tried to steal the secret formula in a while and that's making Mr. Krabs nervous. SpongeBob introduces Patrick to the wonderful world of book learning.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Life Insurance/ Burst Your Bubble
programme.desc: After a misunderstanding, SpongeBob and Patrick try to prove their life insurance protects them from any danger. When SpongeBob blows himself a bubble boat, everyone in town wants one. Everyone except Mrs. Puff, that is.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Tutor Sauce/ Lost in Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to take a shortcut to work, but gets lost along the way. After failing his driver's test, Mr. Krabs decides to teach SpongeBob how to drive himself.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krabby Patty Creature Feature/ Teacher's Pests
programme.desc: A new secret Krabby Patty formula has disastrous results for Bikini Bottom, and only SpongeBob can save the day. Mr. Krabs and Plankton have to take boating school classes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squid Noir/ ScavengerPants
programme.desc: When his clarinet goes missing, Squidward must become a hardboiled detective to track it down. Squidward sends SpongeBob and Patrick on an increasingly difficult scavenger hunt to get them out of his hair.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mall Girl Pearl/ Two Thumbs Down
programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that's hiring is the lamest store at the mall. SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs, and must get them back in working order before his entire life falls apart.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: It Came From Goo Lagoon
programme.desc: A giant goo bubble emerges from Goo Lagoon and threatens all of Bikini Bottom. Plankton plans to use the bubble for his own evil ends.

programme.title: Danger Force: The Danger Force Awakens
programme.desc: Captain Man has a new crew of superhero sidekicks, Danger Force, but when he tells them there's a 'crime drought' in Swellview, they begin to suspect that he's fighting crime without them.

programme.title: The Loud House: Fed Up/ Shell Shock
programme.desc: The kids make a plan to sabotage dinner so they can have pizza. Lincoln and Ronnie Anne have to take care of an egg baby, but Lincoln doesn't trust her with the fragile egg.

programme.title: Defying Death: Heroes & Survivors: Inside Death Zones
programme.desc: Everest guides rescue climbers from the death zone while a quiet country town battles a fearsome flash flood. A hero drives survivors to salvation during a hurricane and a frigid ocean sinks a fishing boat and the crew fights for survival.

programme.title: World's Wildest Weather: Racing a Wildfire
programme.desc: In Australia, a tourist drives straight into the path of a raging bushfire, unrelenting floods cause thousands of people to flee their homes, and a man sees his life flash before his eyes as he is struck in the head by lightning.

programme.title: World's Wildest Weather: Hurricane Highway
programme.desc: We hear from the Ferguson family of Canton, Texas, whose home was destroyed by a tornado as they cowered under a mattress inside, and Hank Schyma the storm chaser who came to their aid.

programme.title: World's Wildest Weather: Monster Typhoon
programme.desc: Discover a family business which was destroyed by the flooding in the UK in 2015.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Double Crossed
programme.desc: Mitch finds a wreck involving two semis. Reliable and Aggressive Towing team up to rescue a pair of entangled 18-wheelers. Jamie is tested by an abandoned trailer. Gord finds himself in deep in a peat bog.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Holy Mackerel, What a Mess
programme.desc: After a triple crash, the crew from Chatham struggles to keep a mangled truck in one piece. A complicated air cushion jobs tests a new rotator operator. The new heavy crew at Metro gets a bad case of déjà vu.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: The Donner Party
programme.desc: A story of weather’s most-infamous tale. What starts as a call to the West quickly turns to a deadly journey for three families and their compatriots on a quest for the American dream.

programme.title: Journey Through the Icebergs
programme.desc: Dave Malkoff follows the crew of a small sailboat as they dodge icebergs and try to navigate the icy Arctic Ocean. A daring attempt to make it through the Northwest Passage and they're bringing their young children along.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Surviving Animal Attacks
programme.desc: Jaw-dropping animal videos show how weather affects moose, wild turkeys and vicious reef sharks. What to do when a 7000-pound whale drags you deep into the ocean and how to respond when a raging buffalo charges is featured.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Wildfires and Flash Floods
programme.desc: Blinding snow, suffocating sand and scorching flames. How to survive a raging inferno approaching and how to escape a car if caught in a flash flood and sinking fast.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Surviving Tornadoes
programme.desc: Video of tornadoes tearing through an airport, a gas station and a trailer park is shown. What do you do when a tornado towers beside your car and how to survive a brutal twister that rips through a city is featured.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Avalanches and Volcanoes
programme.desc: Exploding glaciers, venomous snakes and ground crumbling earthquakes. How to survive being buried alive by a massive avalanche and what do when face-to-face with scorching lava erupting from a volcano is also featured.

programme.title: AMHQ Weekend
programme.desc: The science and stories of weather, plus in-depth forecasts with a focus on weekend weather.

programme.title: Weekend Recharge
programme.desc: The latest news and weather to prepare for the weekend.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: The Birth and Death of the Planet
programme.desc: Tracing the series of events that developed the Earth from its birth in the solar system to where the Earth could be billions of years ahead from now.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Abandoned Places
programme.desc: When the cities of man are forgotten, Mother Nature moves quickly to reclaim what is hers. Nature’s attack on abandoned homes and buildings in Detroit, New Orleans and one Caribbean paradise is waged in three very different ways.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter: Deadliest Mudslide
programme.desc: A mudslide in Washington State, triggered by heavy rainfall, rips through a hillside community, killing 43 people.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter: Arkansas Flash Flood
programme.desc: A flash flood at an Arkansas campsite flood leaves 20 dead, including 7 children.

programme.title: Hoarders: Dorothy and David and Doris
programme.desc: Dorothy and David fell in love with each other over their mutual love of hoarding. Their home is so packed now it has become physically unsafe for Dorothy, and doctors have said one more fall in the hoard could paralyze her.

programme.title: Hoarders: Kathy and Elmira
programme.desc: Kathy has hoarded out her triplex and a dance studio and is facing financial ruin if she can't clean up and rent out her spaces.

programme.title: Hoarders: Ruby and Mary

programme.title: Hoarders: Roxann and Barbara
programme.desc: Roxann is a vibrant, beautiful 32-year old mother and former model who has successfully hidden her hoarding until now. She fears Child Protective Services will intervene if she doesn't clean up her hoarded home.

programme.title: Hoarders: Peggy and Ed and Connie
programme.desc: Peggy's hoard of filth and dead animal carcasses has led the city to deem her house uninhabitable. If she does not clean up, city officials will not allow Peggy to return to her beloved home.

programme.desc: A naked woman steals a deputy's patrol truck; Ohio Troopers save a kidnapping victim; and a New Mexico State representative is arrested for DWI.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam

programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe convince shoppers to repeat odd catch phrases, then go mental as psychoanalysts. Plus, tonight's losers perform at a halftime show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Parent Trap

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Vampire Weakened

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a bike but won't ride it in the city, how Murr gets around backstage while on tour and what Murr's building staff refused to do during his punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sweat the Small Things
programme.desc: Find out what Q considers one of the worst punishments of all time, and what prank Joe often pulls on Sal when they're traveling.

programme.title: Movie: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Henry Roth, a veterinarian who's afraid of commitment, falls in love with Lucy who suffers from short-term memory loss. In an attempt to win her over, Henry sets out to remind Lucy why she fell for him the first time by romancing her each new day.

programme.title: Movie: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Henry Roth, a veterinarian who's afraid of commitment, falls in love with Lucy who suffers from short-term memory loss. In an attempt to win her over, Henry sets out to remind Lucy why she fell for him the first time by romancing her each new day.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sweat the Small Things
programme.desc: Find out what Q considers one of the worst punishments of all time, and what prank Joe often pulls on Sal when they're traveling.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Pizza Panties
programme.desc: Vanessa Gonzalez gets hot and heavy over pizza, Rita Brent meets a six-year-old with more than just an old soul, and Gina Yashere comes face to face with a Jamaican pick-up artist. Plus, Orlando Leyba exposes a big scam at the gym.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Losing My Religion
programme.desc: Correy Bell makes tumbling down the stairs look sexy, and Dave Helem has a message for substitute teachers. Plus, Pretty Ricki puts the 'C'' in crazy' and Dave Temple has a church experience he'll never forget.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Two-Week Girl
programme.desc: Funny woman Tyree Elaine wants you to know she is tired of your relationship statuses, Nate Jackson has a hilarious message for the church, and Alycia Cooper takes a non-smoker's break so she can think outside the cubicle.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: 'Til Death
programme.desc: Gina Yashere gets a tough lesson about her Nigerian roots, Owen Smith explains the early days of marriage, and substitute teacher Orlando Baxter meets a student with nine lives. Plus, find out how Orlando Leyba was rescued from the wild.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: First Class
programme.desc: Mark Viera's granddad breaks all the rules, Barry Brewer explains the not-so-friendly skies, and Yamaneika stars in host Cipha Sounds' 'Joke of the Night.'

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Strong Women
programme.desc: Reyna Amaya gets a game-changing gift from a co-worker, Donnivin Jordan is into his mom's friend and find out how petty Tony Baker gets on planes. Plus, Aida Rodriguez brings the fire while giving birth to the 'Joke of the Night.'

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Partiers 20

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Hillbillies 5
programme.desc: Counting down the 20 most blockheaded bumpkins ever caught on tape.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Brawlers 13
programme.desc: Watch 20 of the wildest, most pointless brawls every captured on film. You'll see a vicious slap fight, a seriously low blow, and some amazing girl on girl on girl action.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Brawlers 14
programme.desc: More boneheaded brawlers including: people fighting in the name of beer pong, tussling with wildlife, throwing punches in Disneyland, and turning a busy intersection into a boxing ring.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Inventions 9
programme.desc: Devices to keep your toilet seat warm and your soda under lock and key, plus a robot with astounding assets.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Adam Devine
programme.desc: Adam Devine patriotically challenges the wings of death; all while channeling Macho Man Randy Savage and his Pitch Perfect audition.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Jonas Brothers
programme.desc: The Jonas Brothers battle against the wings of death while discussing topics such as Met Gala hangouts with OBJ and Taylor Swift's anti-paparazzi techniques.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Ken Jeong
programme.desc: Ken Jeong battles against Sean Evans and the wings of death, all while dispelling common medical myths and discussing his encounters with NB legends like Shaq and Kevin Durant.

programme.desc: Why the slow-moving line at The Fast and the Furious ride made things harder for the guys, who officiated Joe's wedding, and why last-minute changes were needed for Murr's Tumblr punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover what kind of vehicle the Jokers had to stay in for a challenge. Plus, find out how Murr’s TV career actually started. Finally, find out why tonight's punishment was nostalgic for the guys.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Quantum Mock-Anics
programme.desc: Find out which joker gets dizzy when a cab has a strong air freshener, who can speak Spanish, and which joker struggles to keep a straight face during Joe's 'expert' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr chose which guys to honk at Volcano Bay, what happened to the TP used in the stock boy shootout, and how Joe stayed safe after messing with NY Mets fans at Citi Field.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One

programme.title: Movie: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: Sean Boswell travels to Tokyo to live with his father in the hopes of avoiding a jail sentence. In an impoverished section of the city, he gets drawn into the world of drift racing.

programme.title: Movie: Fast and Furious
programme.desc: After Letty is killed, Dom returns to America in search of her killer. Brian is an FBI agent who is on the same trail as Dom, which leads to a drug ring and Letty's killer. Infiltrating the driver ranks, Dom and Brian try to get to the bottom things.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Dopplegangers
programme.desc: Leslie pairs up the Pawnee Parks employees with their Eagleton counterparts. Ben and Chris reunited for an accounting project.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Gin It Up!
programme.desc: Leslie tries to calm a minor scandal that gets blown out of proportion. Tom tries to impress a new love interest.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Filibuster
programme.desc: Leslie throws Ben a birthday bash but is forced to leave early for an emergency filibuster. Tom tries to make some memories with his new girlfriend.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Recall Vote
programme.desc: Leslie prepares a haunted house with Ben, Ann and Chris for Halloween on the day of the recall vote. Meanwhile, Tom fears the end of Rent-A-Swag and persuades Ron to help save his business.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Fluoride
programme.desc: Leslie tries to complete some of her biggest city council goals, like hosting an NFL event. Chris and Ron attempt to bond while building cribs for their future children.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: The Cones of Dunshire
programme.desc: Leslie goes toe-to-toe with Councilman Jamm in a marathon negotiating session.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Second Chunce
programme.desc: Leslie comes to terms with her last day in office and makes plans for her future with Ben. Chris and Ann find out the sex of their child.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: New Beginnings
programme.desc: Leslie and Ben both face new challenges on the first day of new jobs. Donna, April and Andy pull a prank on Ben.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Farmers Market
programme.desc: Leslie fights with Ben over questionable sales techniques at the local farmers market. Ann searches for a way to vent about the annoying aspects of her pregnancy.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Ann and Chris
programme.desc: On Ann and Chris' last night in Pawnee, Leslie throws a grand farewell party and attempts to fulfil one last promise.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Anniversaries
programme.desc: Ben attempts to surprise Leslie with a special anniversary gift. Tom and Adam try to help Leslie bring a positive light to the Pawnee-Eagleton Merger, while April asserts her new authority as Donna's boss.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: The Wall
programme.desc: After Leslie tries to take down the wall separating Pawnee and Eagleton, her life takes several unexpected turns.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: New Slogan
programme.desc: Leslie aims to create a new town slogan, but runs afoul of local shock jocks. Andy scouts bands to play the Unity Concert and discovers an interesting secret about Ron, while Tom looks for a restaurant locale with Donna and April.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Galentine's Day
programme.desc: Leslie throws a hasty Galentine's Day in attempt to find a replacement for Ann. Tom and Ben look to finalize a deal on tents for the Unity Concert, while Ron finds himself looking after Andy.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Prom
programme.desc: Leslie helps organize the high school's Senior Prom and battles with Ron over the future employment of a bright high school senior. Andy takes an unwilling April as his date.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Flu Season 2
programme.desc: In the midst of flu season, a sick Leslie and Andy struggle to book performers for the Unity Concert. Meanwhile, Tom heads to a wine competition in search of a sommelier for his new restaurant.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: One in 8,000
programme.desc: Leslie and Ben run a charity auction to raise funds for the unity concert. April steps in to manage Andy's schedule, while Donna asks Ron for help with her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Moving Up
programme.desc: Leslie, Ben and Andy head to San Francisco for a National Parks conference. Tom opens his restaurant, and Ron has another run in with his ex-wife, Tammy 2. Leslie makes a huge decision about her future.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Moving Up
programme.desc: Leslie, Ben and Andy head to San Francisco for a National Parks conference. Tom opens his restaurant, and Ron has another run in with his ex-wife, Tammy 2. Leslie makes a huge decision about her future.

programme.title: Movie: The Fast and the Furious
programme.desc: An undercover police officer infiltrates an L.A. street gang in order to crack a hijacking ring.

programme.title: Movie: Too Fast Too Furious
programme.desc: An officer, stripped of his badge, is recruited to infiltrate an illegal Miami street racing circuit in an effort to redeem himself.

programme.title: Movie: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: Sean Boswell travels to Tokyo to live with his father in the hopes of avoiding a jail sentence. In an impoverished section of the city, he gets drawn into the world of drift racing.

programme.title: Movie: Fast and Furious
programme.desc: After Letty is killed, Dom returns to America in search of her killer. Brian is an FBI agent who is on the same trail as Dom, which leads to a drug ring and Letty's killer. Infiltrating the driver ranks, Dom and Brian try to get to the bottom things.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Diners, Drive-Ins And Dives Tournament 2: Finale
programme.desc: Guy Fieri takes the final four DDD chefs on an epic cross-country road trip by dividing Flavortown into the East Coast, Midwest and West Coast. First, Guy turns the frozen section into a chilly New York scene.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: That's Fresh
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's stopping by some joints that are keeping it fresh. In San Francisco, the Venezuelan joint serving up a totally gluten-free menu of authentic standbys like arepas and empanadas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meat Lover's Paradise
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's signing up for a meat-crazed master class. In Portland, Ore., the craft-cooking family joint with a chef who butchers, cures, preserves and smokes everything in-house.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hot Meat and Cool Veg
programme.desc: Modesto, Calif. has Portuguese sausage and lamb burgers. Oakland has a vegan joint with okra gumbo. Also, wings and pork rinds in Islamorada, Fla.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Creole, Cold Cuts and Crepes
programme.desc: Guy's cookin' up everything from creole to cold cuts to crazy Asian crepes. First, a multi-generational joint bringing New Orleans to Los Angeles with off-the-hook gumbo and etouffee.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bagels, Biscuit and Boar
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is diggin' into all kinds of flavour, starting in Santa Fe, N.M., at a pub serving comfort grub like chicken and biscuits and in-the-shell clam chowder. Also, a spot in Reno, NV, is on its game with a double elk chop and wild boar spaetzle.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Beef, Lamb And Pig
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's going for all kinds of meaty favourites. In Louisville, Kentucky, a real-deal Irish pub serves up cottage pie and a lamb-cabbage specialty. In Charlotte, North Carolina, a funky spot puts out flavourful Asian-barbecue fusion.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Meals
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is embracing family-run spots on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, two brothers-in-law carryin' on a decades-long seafood tradition. In Richmond, Va., a mother-son duo running a breakfast, lunch and dinner joint in honor of their Pop.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sausage, Shawarma and Scaloppini
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's travels take him to a unique little Italian restaurant in Wilmington, Del. that serves unbelievable arancini and veal scaloppini. A Middle Eastern street food spot in San Diego features some phenomenal falafel and shawarma.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Down-Home Flavor
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hitting the road and digging into some down-home cooking. In Garland, Utah, a century-old staple servin' up savory sandwiches and a legendary sweet treat.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Crazy Chicken and Twisted Burgers
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's digging into crazy twists on chicken and burgers! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a bourbon bar that's piling pork onto a patty and doctoring up chicken skins.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Italian, Hawaiian and Colombian
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's digging into a multicultural flavour fest. In Hawaii, a poke place is knocking it out of the park with their island specialties. In San Carlos, California, a crazy Italian spot putting tasty twists on their homemade pasta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Neighborhood Knockouts
programme.desc: Guy's traveling up and down the west coast in search of funky neighbourhood joints.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Meals

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Italian
programme.desc: Ina Garten is sharing all her secrets and pro tips for Italian dishes. She starts with a fabulous two-fer, tomato eggplant soup, and the leftovers become baked pasta with tomatoes and eggplant.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Inspired By Italy
programme.desc: Bobby Flay makes an Italian-inspired brunch for his Naples-born friend, Cooking Channel's Laura Vitale. He puts his spin on everyone's favorite Italian dish with Breakfast Pizza, adds freshness with Dandelion Green Salad.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Celebration Dinner Party
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's chef friends visit the ranch. Alex Guarnaschelli puts a twist on Caesar salad with spicy pancetta and cornbread croutons, and she gives a kick to pineapple upside-down cake.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Dinner Fit For A Queen
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli cooks a springtime feast for her family by adapting some of her mom's favorite recipes. When she has trouble remembering a recipe, Valerie videochats with her mom, Mrs. B, for advice.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Take Three
programme.desc: Ree Drummond uses just three ingredients in a round-the-clock range of dishes. She makes ham and cheese loaf, an unbeatable penne pecorino, and fried mozzarella makes a perfect anytime snack or appetizer.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Never Enough Puff
programme.desc: Ree shares her top five favorite things to do with puffed pastry, her secret weapon for entertaining made easy! First, cheese straws and sausage parmesan palmiers are a duo of divine quick and easy canapes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Driving Fence Posts
programme.desc: There's a great sack lunch and a bunch of pranks in store as Ree Drummond’s family tackles a big fence post project on the ranch. She makes some strip steak sandwiches with grilled onions and over easy eggs. Plus, shortcut mini pecan pies.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Four In Hand
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has portable food in hand with four fantastic on-the-go ideas. There's breakfast bagel burgers that are the perfect start to the day for a teenage cowboy. Taco chicken Caesar salad wraps are a great on-the-go meal.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Spring Feast
programme.desc: Molly Yeh makes a delicious farm spread to celebrate the arrival of spring with her family. She's making homemade herbed pasta with feta, lemon and pine nuts, hearty meatballs with garlic yogurt and chimichurri, and spring apple and fennel salad.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Say Hello To The Flavors Of Spring
programme.desc: Valerie prepares a meal of spring delights for her husband and friends.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Wadmalaw Days
programme.desc: Kardea invites her mom, grandma and cousin to take a day trip to Wadmalaw Island, where she spent much of her childhood.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Jade's Feel Good Party
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis serves a healthy, kid-friendly lunch for her daughter Jade and friends after a yoga and stretching class.

programme.title: The Kitchen: A Bountiful Spring Spread
programme.desc: The kitchen serves up a perfect spring menu with show-stopping dishes like Katie Lee's maple orange bourbon glazed ham with garlic drop biscuits and Jeff Mauro's baby shells béchamel. The hosts demonstrate three fun new ways to decorate Easter eggs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mex to the Max
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's crossing the states to get some south of the border flavor. From Florida to California, Southwest to Midwest, he's diving into everything from tacos, tamales and tortas to al pastor and pozole. Plus, fiery burritos and seafood sensations.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Real Deal Mexican
programme.desc: Some of the best stops on Guy's road trip have been Mexican Places. With generations of family recipes and fresh ingredients, it's not wonder the food is incredible.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Comfort Food Mash-Up
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's hitting joints from coast to coast cookin' up killer comfort. He's digging into everything from chicken and waffles to pot roast, noodles to pierogies, and even outrageous oxtail stew.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Audit

programme.desc: Constant bickering causes the girls to seek help from a therapist. This prompts the girls to reminisce about times they didn't get along. The therapist's conclusion: they should not live with one another.

programme.desc: Dee and Mac decide to raise a baby that was found in the dumpster by the group. Charlie wants to find the truth about his paternity.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Gets Invincible
programme.desc: There are quite a few people who are interested in trying out for the Philadelphia Eagles.

programme.title: You're the Worst: A Very Good Boy

programme.title: Movie: Neighbors
programme.desc: A couple's hopes for raising their new baby in a quiet neighbourhood are shattered when a fraternity moves into the house next door. An all-out war is waged when the family finally calls in a noise complaint on the frat boys, who are quick to retaliate.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Moms
programme.desc: Amy Mitchell seemingly has a perfect life with a career and children, however, she is dangerously over-worked. She finally snaps at a PTA meeting and joins forces with two other moms. Together, they go on a wild binge of freedom and indulgence.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart the Murderer
programme.desc: After having a lousy day at school, Bart accidentally stumbles into a mobster front.

programme.title: The Simpsons: New Kid on the Block
programme.desc: Feelings aren't mutual when Bart falls hard for Evergreen Terrace's newest neighbour, Laura, who only thinks of Bart as her little friend.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror IV
programme.desc: Homer gives up his soul for a single doughnut and Bart has a nightmare about a bus crash.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Boy Who Knew Too Much
programme.desc: Bart skips class and witnesses a brutal beating and must clear Freddy Quimby of the crime.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Day the Violence Died
programme.desc: Bart helps a homeless man prove he was the rightful creator of Itchy and Scratchy. But when the man is awarded damages in court, the Itchy and Scratchy studios have to close for good.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Parent Rap
programme.desc: Bart is brought before no-nonsense Judge Harm when he is caught stealing a police car.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Ziff Who Came to Dinner
programme.desc: When friendless Artie Ziff loses his dot.com fortune, he begs Homer to let him move in.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Funeral for a Fiend
programme.desc: When Bart accidentally kills his nemesis Sideshow Bob, Bob's brother Cecil invites him to a memorial service with the intention of burying the hatchet for good.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Krusty the Clown
programme.desc: Homer finds his calling as a TV recapper, but his harsh grading causes a brawl with Krusty. After almost killing Homer, Krusty hides out at a real circus, and finds happiness there.

programme.title: The Simpsons: 101 Mitigations
programme.desc: After Homer steals Comic Book Guy's car, he must either prove his innocence in court or reconcile with the jilted nerd.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles cover roughly three per cent of our planet yet contain 50 per cent of the world's species. In the Ngogo forest, the largest chimpanzee group defends its territory from neighbouring groups. Other specialists include a parasitic fungi.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Shallow Seas
programme.desc: A humpback whale mother and calf embark on a journey from tropical coral paradises to storm-ravaged polar seas. Indonesian coral reefs reveal seahorses, clams and sea kraits. Bull fur seals attack king penguins, and sea urchins fell forests of kelp.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Seasonal Forests
programme.desc: From the evergreen forests of the frozen north to the deciduous dry forests of the Equator, discover the greatest woodlands on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ocean Deep
programme.desc: In the ocean, life goes to extraordinary lengths to survive this immense realm. A 30-tonne whale shark gorges on a school of fish. Deep sea octopus fly in the abyss and vampire squid use bioluminescence to create a colour display.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ice Worlds
programme.desc: The Arctic and Antarctic experience the most extreme seasons on Earth. Time-lapse cameras watch a colony of penguins, while aerial images show a polar bear swimming more than 100 km.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Great Plains
programme.desc: After filming for three years, the shy Mongolian gazelle and the bizarre-looking Tibetan fox are captured on film. Over six weeks, the team follows a pride of 30 lions as they attempt to hunt elephants.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Jungles

programme.title: The Blue Planet: Tidal Seas
programme.desc: A look at how tides create opportunities for marine life.

programme.title: The Blue Planet: Coasts
programme.desc: Coasts, the boundary between land and sea, are exciting places with animals constantly coming and going.

programme.title: Movie: Knowing
programme.desc: A teacher opens a time capsule and finds a paper written years earlier by a young girl. The numbers don't seem to correlate into anything, until he figures out a code of dates and times that match horrific events in the past and, potentially, the future.

programme.title: Movie: First Blood
programme.desc: Wandering into a small town, ex-Green Beret John Rambo is targeted, arrested and abused by the local police. When he escapes, Rambo flashes back to his time as a POW and heads into the hills, armed to the teeth and ready to take on those who hunt him.

programme.title: Movie: Rambo: First Blood Part II
