programme.desc: Two innocent teenage girls are targeted by obsessed stalkers. One manages to survive, and after police raid her stalker's home, he's sent to prison. The other had no idea she had a stalker until he killed her, then himself.

programme.title: Look Who's Stalking
programme.desc: A man takes cyber-stalking to a whole new level by sending hundreds of threatening messages and posting over 40 videos on social media that document his twisted fixation for a former high school classmate.

programme.title: Look Who's Stalking
programme.desc: A woman scared to death by a stalker is relieved when he disappears for a few years--only to make a terrifying return.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: They're Hitting the Highway
programme.desc: A stolen vehicle is found abandoned, rolling backwards down the street.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Bail Out, Bail Out
programme.desc: An officer gets involved in a foot chase across the highway; the force uses a man's cigarettes to arrest him for theft.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Don't Think I Can Make It in Jail
programme.desc: The Task Force acquires a new piece of equipment and finds it to be very helpful. Later, the A.T.T.F helps the Newark police catch an armed robbery vehicle.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: It's the Brick Bandit!
programme.desc: The Task Force chases the 'Brick bandit' who leaves bricks in the car he steals. An officer has to take down a suspect by himself during a tense night.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Freeway Phantom
programme.desc: In 1971 and '72, Washington DC is terrorized by a cunning killer who abducts and murders six young African American girls. Police and the community are outraged by the serial killings that target young children in their own neighborhoods.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: A Killing in Chinatown
programme.desc: Art imitates life when Cambodian genocide survivor Dr. Haing Ngor wins an Oscar for his role in the film The Killing Fields. But when he's gunned down the LAPD investigate a web of political intrigue, revenge and street gangs to uncover the truth.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Nine Years in the Shadows
programme.desc: When a young woman is found murdered in her Modesto, CA home in 1988, police investigate the strife and infidelity on both sides of her marriage. But it's a surprising witness who eventually leads police to her killer.

programme.title: Fatal Florida: Violence in Jacksonville
programme.desc: A tight-knit community in Jacksonville, Florida where an old-fashioned group of homeowners that never hesitate to help out a neighbor-in-need becomes the unlikely scene of a grisly murder.

programme.title: Fatal Florida: Murder in Miami
programme.desc: When a pillar in the Miami dance community is found murdered, police must figure out how the American dream turned into a nightmare for this Peruvian immigrant.

programme.title: Fatal Florida: Perilous Palm Beach
programme.desc: When the siren call of an attractive neighbor becomes too tempting for one man, a series of events unfold that leave the Palm Beach community forever changed.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Violent Vendetta
programme.desc: A family feud escalates to brutal violence and John joins police in pursuit of Top Ten FBI fugitive Eugene Palmer; Callahan immerses himself in one of the most brutal cases he's ever seen as he helps authorities track down Tamera Williams.

programme.title: Fatal Florida: Murder in Miami
programme.desc: When a pillar in the Miami dance community is found murdered, police must figure out how the American dream turned into a nightmare for this Peruvian immigrant.

programme.title: Fatal Florida: Perilous Palm Beach
programme.desc: When the siren call of an attractive neighbor becomes too tempting for one man, a series of events unfold that leave the Palm Beach community forever changed.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Violent Vendetta
programme.desc: A family feud escalates to brutal violence and John joins police in pursuit of Top Ten FBI fugitive Eugene Palmer; Callahan immerses himself in one of the most brutal cases he's ever seen as he helps authorities track down Tamera Williams.

programme.title: Fatal Florida: Violence in Jacksonville
programme.desc: A tight-knit community in Jacksonville, Florida where an old-fashioned group of homeowners that never hesitate to help out a neighbor-in-need becomes the unlikely scene of a grisly murder.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Lurking in the Hollers
programme.desc: Family means everything to folks who live in the mountain hollers of Townsend, Tennessee. When one member of the large Griffin clan is found murdered and another goes missing, investigators begin to suspect that a family feud may have taken a deadly turn.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Dangers of Success
programme.desc: As a prominent family awakens to noises in the night, their worst nightmare ensues when their beloved daughter Terri Ann McCoy is fatally shot. Investigators work through leads and lies to discover the perpetrators were closer than they realized.

programme.title: See No Evil: Eye in the Sky
programme.desc: When 27-year-old Christie Wilson disappears after a night at the local casino, surveillance cameras reveal her gambling with a mysterious man. Can this video footage unlock the secrets of what happened next and help bring her home alive?

programme.title: See No Evil: Mr. Reed Will See You
programme.desc: Keith Reed is found gunned down on his doorstep. What seems like a possible crime of passion is turned on its head after a surprise discovery. Surveillance footage helps police unravel the mystery behind Keith's death and just who killed him.

programme.title: See No Evil: Michigan City Murder
programme.desc: On April 23, 2016, car salesman Hufracio Arteaga is found stabbed to death in his Michigan City office. Surveillance cameras in the area may have filmed the fatal encounter.

programme.title: See No Evil: Breakdown at Daylight
programme.desc: 17-year old Casey Crowder vanished early one Sunday morning after her car ran out of gas outside of Dumas, Arkansas. With no leads and no witnesses, investigators are desperate to find any CCTV cameras that can lead them to the missing teen.

programme.title: See No Evil: Snatched on Camera
programme.desc: Nineteen-year-old college student Katie Poirier vanishes while working the graveyard shift at a gas station. It's a family's worst nightmare come true. Grainy security footage reveals an answer... but leaves a community in fear.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: A father-to-be is shot while out for a morning walk, leaving his wife a widow. Security footage from the scene reveals his final, shocking moments.

programme.title: See No Evil: Watch Me Disappear
programme.desc: Sian O'Callaghan disappears after a night out in Swindon, UK. With the clock ticking, Detectives pull hours of surveillance footage from the area, until they hit gold: footage of her getting into a taxi. Now the race is on to ID the vehicle and driver.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Tried to Prevent This
programme.desc: For 17 years, Kathy Swanson feared her son, Michael, would one day harm someone. For 17 years, she tried in vain to convince people that something about Michael was different until that dreadful day finally came that her worst nightmare came true.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Prophet
programme.desc: To Kevin Currie, Mormon prophet Jeffrey Lundgren was more than a spiritual leader, he was a brother. But before long, Kevin realized that this Man of God was really a devil in disguise with an evil plan.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: On the Run
programme.desc: When Susan Hamlin walks into a police station to confess that she is part of a satanic cult and plans to murder her husband, no one could guess that the truth is even more bizarre and sinister, or that it is all part of her own desperate escape plan.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Brother's Secrets
programme.desc: Sean Lewis isn't surprised to hear his brother, Patrick, has been arrested again. But this time, Sean learns that every time he had helped his brother get out of some jam he was unwittingly helping a monster continue living a secret double life.

programme.title: Sam Giancana: Mafia vs. CIA
programme.desc: We reveal the secrets of the Mafia's most notorious members, beginning with Sam Giancana, who was associated with the Kennedys, Frank Sinatra, and the CIA.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Vito Genovese
programme.desc: The story of Vito Genovese, who ruthlessly dealt with disloyalty in the Mafia and quickly rose to prominence - but unwittingly caused his own downfall.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joe Colombo
programme.desc: Documenting the life of the money-loving mafia man Joe Colombo, who campaigned against harassment of Italian-Americans in the 1970s.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Mob Cops
programme.desc: In the 1980's and 90's the mafia controls the New York criminal underworld. By the early 2000's, evidence surfaces that the mob has gone much further and has people inside the NYPD. Now a dedicated team of detectives must find out who are the Mob Cops.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Dutch Schultz
programme.desc: In the lawless days of Prohibition America, one gangster stands out as the black sheep Dutch Schultz. When Dutch threatens to kill a state prosecutor, the mob can't risk the fallout, so they send Dutch a special message: a body full of lead.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Lucky Luciano
programme.desc: The story of crime boss Charlie 'Lucky' Luciano, who used his Mafia connections to help the US government during the Second World War in return for his parole.

programme.title: Al Capone: Public Enemy #1
programme.desc: America's first superstar gangster, Al Capone, dominated headlines and is said to be responsible for the bloody St Valentines' Day Massacre. After being made the face of organized crime by US government Capone's public image brings about his downfall.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Dutch Schultz

programme.title: The Mafia's Banker
programme.desc: A close associate of long-time Teamsters President Jimmy Hoffa and associated with the Chicago Outfit, Allen Dorfman embezzled millions for the mob and himself until he was violently murdered in 1983.

programme.title: Meyer Lansky and the Crime Syndicate
programme.desc: The story of Meyer Lansky, an associate of Lucky Luciano who was linked to criminal financial operations, but the FBI struggled to pin anything on him, or find his riches.

programme.title: The Renegade Mobster
programme.desc: Crazy Joey Gallo psychopathic killer, beatnik hipster and renegade mobster. Burning with rage and determined to make his way to the top, he wages all-out war against the US and sparks a revolution in the mafia before going down in a hail of bullets.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Peace and War
programme.desc: By the mid 1970s, the Cold War has remained a fact of life for decades. But 30 years into the war, and the doctrine of mutually assured destruction doesn't feel like a roadmap to peace. It's an arms race, a propaganda and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Rise of the Superpowers
programme.desc: For four decades ago, two global superpowers faced off, threatening to annihilate one another with the push of a button. It is an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Paranoia
programme.desc: As the propaganda war and the arms race rage on, the 1950's becomes the decade of paranoia. The stalemate between democracy and communism reaches a fever pitch as the world descends further in chaos.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Pearl Harbor Cover Up
programme.desc: History says that this was the ultimate sneak attack, but conspiracists are convinced that the U.S. President knew it was coming and decided to sacrifice their own troops to give the country an excuse to join the war against Germany.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The UFO Cover-Up
programme.desc: Discover the truth behind the UFO cover up. Attempt to discover if there is a hidden 'shadow government' that guards the truth, even from the President.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Ancient Astronauts
programme.desc: The idea of ancient astronauts goes back to Swiss author Erich von Daniken, whose books challenged religion and science. Find out who his enemies were, what his influences were, and why he was jailed.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Cold War in Space
programme.desc: July 21st, 1969 saw one of the iconic events of the 20th century when the Apollo 10 crew set foot on the moon. However, some claim the moon landings were faked. A hacker claims to have found evidence of a U.S. space fleet fueled by alien technology.

programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!
programme.desc: When Stan, Dipper, Mabel and Soos find themselves falling into a bottomless pit, they each decide to tell a different story to pass the time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Muira-Horror!
programme.desc: Hiro and Go Go accompany Krei to the woods to deal with Nedd Ludd, however they run into the monster of legend, the Hibagon, along the way.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Something Fluffy
programme.desc: When mysterious but adorable creatures called Mayoi suddenly appear in San Fransokyo, Hiro is convinced that they’re part of some nefarious plot by Liv Amara.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Take Me Down to The Donut County
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays: The Return of the Parker
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Spear of Selene!
programme.desc: Donald is dragged into a feud between Scrooge and Zeus, while Dewey and Webby search for an artifact that may provide the truth about Dewey's mother.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Missing Links of Moorshire!
programme.desc: Dewey's natural golf abilities challenge Scrooge's ego while a seemingly innocent, mystical golf course leads the group into trouble.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Not What He Seems
programme.desc: Government agents take Stan into custody, making Dipper and Mabel question how much they really know about their Grunkle Stan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Shadow War!
programme.desc: Magica De Spell is close to exacting revenge on Scrooge, so the family races against time to plan a dangerous rescue mission to save Scrooge and the city.

programme.title: DuckTales: Friendship Hates Magic!
programme.desc: Stuck as a shadow, Lena tries to protect Webby from her suspicious new friend Violet during a supernatural sleepover.

programme.title: DuckTales: A Nightmare on Killmotor Hill!
programme.desc: The kids are pulled into a world made of their wildest dreams. Unfortunately, Lena's worst nightmare comes true: Magica De Spell is back and coming to reclaim what's hers.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fred the Fugitive

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End

programme.title: Big City Greens: Level Up/ Wild Side

programme.title: Outlander: Better to Marry Than Burn

programme.title: Movie: The Girl in the Spider's Web

programme.title: Movie: Once Upon A Time...In Hollywood
programme.desc: In 1969 Los Angeles, a former Western star and his longtime stunt double struggle to find success in a Hollywood that they don't recognize anymore.

programme.title: Movie: Two Turtle Doves
programme.desc: A doctor returns to her hometown in search of a beloved family heirloom. While visiting, she meets a little girl, and her father, and teaches the two of them what the true meaning of the holidays are.

programme.title: Movie: Holiday Hearts

programme.title: Movie: Once Upon a Christmas Miracle
programme.desc: A woman falls in love with her liver donor, and his selfless gesture leads to a Christmas miracle for everyone.

programme.title: Movie: Northern Lights of Christmas
programme.desc: A woman's goals are thrown off course when she inherits a reindeer farm and a dangerously handsome ranch hand, Alec. When Alec opens up, the two start falling for each other.

programme.title: Movie: A Homecoming for the Holidays
programme.desc: A country-singer returns home for the holidays and meets her brother's friend, an ex-soldier. While home, she works on her new song, plus, spends time with the friend to help him build a house.

programme.title: Movie: Rocky Mountain Christmas
programme.desc: Sarah Davis finds love in an unusual entitled Hollywood star, who visits her family ranch to prepare for a film.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Miracle

programme.title: Movie: Our Christmas Love Song

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Happy Mom, Happy Life
programme.desc: When Dana and Adam have to parent a doll for class, Beverly becomes a grand-smother and compromises their project and relationship. Meanwhile, Erica is annoyed Barry takes up all her best friend time with Lainey.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: Pilot
programme.desc: Despite their initial distaste for one another, two waitresses decide to join forces and open a new business venture of their own.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: Never Surrender
programme.desc: Malik tries to end things with Parker so he can live an honest life with Jenna, but things don't go exactly as planned. Meanwhile, Tasha's epic lie about her relationship with Dante comes to a screeching halt.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Here's the Kicker
programme.desc: Mike is ecstatic when Eve is picked to be her high school's first female kicker. But Vanessa feels high school football could be risky for their youngest daughter.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: For the Love of Great Apes
programme.desc: Jack visits the Center for Great Apes in Florida. The centre is home to orangutans and chimpanzees who were rescued, or retired from the entertainment industry.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Going Batty
programme.desc: In Panama, Jack learns about bats' role in pest control and their amazing echolocation ability. At Canopy Tower, Jack observes the rainforest from above.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Sea Turtles of Pongara
programme.desc: Jack is in Pongara where he sees one-ton leatherback sea turtles coming to shore to lay their eggs.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: 'Old World, New World'
programme.desc: Rogers improves the appearance of the front entry with granite steps that have an antique look. A plaster contractor repairs the plaster mouldings and medalling by hand. A 3D printing specialists shows have repairs can be made in a computer.

programme.title: Chicken Soup for the Soul's Animal Tales: Wild and Rescued
programme.desc: Aspiring zoologists learn about flying with help from hawks. Two ocean loving sisters visit a marine mammal rescue in San Pedro, California. Plus, helping abandoned bear cubs prepare for hibernation.

programme.title: Did I Mention Invention?: Mine Killing Drone
programme.desc: A London innovator creates artistic globes of the world. A man makes mansions in trees. A Medical MacGyver makes health devices from toys. A drone finds and clears landmines from war torn countries.

programme.title: House Smarts
programme.desc: Nationally known home improvement expert Lou Manfredini provides tips for home improvement projects, repairs and maintenance. Also, advice about financing and budgeting these projects is offered.

programme.title: Raw Travel: I Love You, Goodbye Raja Ampat
programme.desc: Viewers are encouraged to break out the passport and explore cultures around the world.

programme.title: Movie: Empire State
programme.desc: Two friends plan to rob an armoured car but a NYPD officer stands in their way.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Bridezilla vs. The Baxters
programme.desc: As the big day approaches, Mandy has turned into a full-blown bridezilla. She fires her wedding planner, puts her whole family to work and refuses to let Kyle wear sneakers with his suit.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: My Father the Car
programme.desc: Mike is determined to get Chuck to sell him a car recently left to him by his late father, but Joe might beat him to the punch. Meanwhile, Kyle shows up with a family Thanksgiving heirloom and Vanessa doesn't even try to hide her distaste for it.

programme.title: Movie: Grandma's Boy
programme.desc: A 35-year-old man named Alex is forced to live with his grandmother after getting thrown out of his former place due to non-payment of rent.

programme.title: Movie: Corky Romano
programme.desc: The black sheep of a mob family pretends to be a thug to help his dad infiltrate the FBI.

programme.title: Movie: A Fish Called Wanda
programme.desc: In London, four very different people team up to commit armed robbery, then try to double-cross each other for the loot. Wanda grows closer to an English lawyer in an attempt to locate the stolen diamonds.

programme.title: Movie: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: A man tries to set things right after he loses the money he and his wife had been saving to buy a duplex in Brooklyn.

programme.title: Movie: Benny and Joon
programme.desc: A misfit who shelters his mentally ill sister stumbles onto the perfect companion for her.

programme.title: Movie: The Lonely Guy
programme.desc: A jilted writer publishes a best-seller about being a lonely guy and becomes very popular.

programme.title: Movie: Keeping Up With the Steins
programme.desc: As a young boy's bar mitzvah approaches, he invites his estranged grandfather to stay with the family. As a result, the boy learns what it means to be a man.

programme.title: Movie: Picture Perfect
programme.desc: In order to get ahead at work, a young advertising executive pretends she's engaged. She must then convince a recent acquaintance to act the part during an important meeting with her boss.

programme.title: Movie: Defending Your Life
programme.desc: After dying in a car accident, a man must defend his life choices before going to heaven.

programme.title: Movie: A Thousand Words
programme.desc: After an encounter with a spiritual guru, a literary agent finds an odd tree in his yard that loses a leaf each time the agent speaks.

programme.title: Movie: The Object of My Affection
programme.desc: A young woman falls hopelessly in love with her best friend, who is also her gay roommate.

programme.title: Movie: Forget Paris
programme.desc: The story of a romance between an NBA referee and an American woman living in Paris.

programme.title: One Night Stand: Flight of the Conchords
programme.desc: Cult folk parody duo Flight of the Conchords entertain a live audience with hilarious songs, witty banter, infectious tunes and their own unique brand of New Zealand humour.

programme.title: Movie: Due Date
programme.desc: After being kicked off an airplane, a man must rent a car and drive cross-country with the person who got him on the no-fly list, in order to make it to his child's birth on time.

programme.title: Movie: Long Shot
programme.desc: A free-spirited journalist bumps into his childhood crush, who happens to be running for the Presidency. She impulsively hires him as her speechwriter, and sparks begin to fly between the two childhood friends despite their very different lives.
